        "contents": "// 代理选择 Hook\nexport const useProxySelection = (options: ProxySelectionOptions = {}) =\u003e {\n  const { current, patchCurrent } = useProfiles();\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n\n  const { onSuccess, onError, enableConnectionCleanup = true } = options;\n\n  // 缓存\n  const config = useMemo(\n    () =\u003e ({\n      autoCloseConnection: verge?.auto_close_connection ?? false,\n      enableConnectionCleanup,\n    }),\n    [verge?.auto_close_connection, enableConnectionCleanup],\n  );\n\n  // 切换节点\n  const changeProxy = useLockFn(\n    async (\n      groupName: string,\n      proxyName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e {\n      debugLog(&#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;);\n\n      try {\n        if (current \u0026\u0026 !skipConfigSave) {\n          const selected = current.selected ? [...current.selected] : [];\n          const index = selected.findIndex((item) =\u003e item.name === groupName);\n\n          if (index \u003c 0) {\n            selected.push({ name: groupName, now: proxyName });\n          } else {\n            selected[index] = { name: groupName, now: proxyName };\n          }\n          await patchCurrent({ selected });\n        }\n\n        await selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName);\n        await syncTrayProxySelection();\n        debugLog(\n          &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理和状态同步完成: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n        );\n\n        onSuccess?.();\n\n        if (\n          config.enableConnectionCleanup \u0026\u0026\n          config.autoCloseConnection \u0026\u0026\n          previousProxy\n        ) {\n          setTimeout(() =\u003e cleanupConnections(previousProxy), 0);\n        }\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\n          &#96;\n\n    }\n;\n;",

        "contents": "export const useProfiles = \nconst activateSelected = async \n\n\n      // 处理所有代理组\n      [global, ...groups].forEach((group) =\u003e {\n        if (!group) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        const { type, name, now } = group;\n        const savedProxy = selectedMap[name];\n        const availableProxies = Array.isArray(group.all) ? group.all : [];\n\n        if (!selectableTypes.has(type)) {\n          if (savedProxy != null || now != null) {\n            const preferredProxy = now ? now : savedProxy;\n            newSelected.push({ name, now: preferredProxy });\n          }\n          return;\n        }\n\n        if (savedProxy == null) {\n          if (now != null) {\n            newSelected.push({ name, now });\n          }\n          return;\n        }\n\n        const existsInGroup = availableProxies.some((proxy) =\u003e {\n          if (typeof proxy === \"string\") {\n            return proxy === savedProxy;\n          }\n\n          return proxy?.name === savedProxy;\n        });\n\n        if (!existsInGroup) {\n          console.warn(\n            &#96;[ActivateSelected] 保存的代理 ${savedProxy} 不存在于代理组 ${name}&#96;,\n          );\n          hasChange = true;\n          newSelected.push({ name, now: now ?? savedProxy });\n          return;\n        }\n\n        if (savedProxy !== now) {\n          debugLog(\n            &#96;[ActivateSelected] 需要切换代理组 ${name}: ${now} -\u003e ${savedProxy}&#96;,\n          );\n          hasChange = true;\n          selectNodeForGroup(name, savedProxy);\n        }\n\n        newSelected.push({ name, now: savedProxy });\n      });\n\n      if (!hasChange) {\n        debugLog(\"[ActivateSelected] 所有代理选择已经是目标状态，无需更新\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      debugLog(&#96;[ActivateSelected] 完成代理切换，保存新的选择配置&#96;);\n\n      try {\n        await patchProfile(profileData.current!, { selected: newSelected })\n;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "use crate::{\n    cmd,\n    config::{Config, PrfItem, PrfOption, profiles::profiles_draft_update_item_safe},\n    core::{CoreManager, handle, tray},\n};\nuse anyhow::{Result, bail};\nuse clash_verge_logging::{Type, logging, logging_error};\nuse smartstring::alias::String;\nuse tauri::Emitter as _;\n\n/// Toggle proxy profile\npub async fn toggle_proxy_profile(profile_index: String) {\n    logging_error!(\n        Type::Config,\n        cmd::patch_profiles_config_by_profile_index(profile_index).await\n    );\n}\n\npub async fn switch_proxy_node(group_name: \u0026str, proxy_name: \u0026str) {\n    match handle::Handle::mihomo()\n        .await\n        .select_node_for_group(group_name, proxy_name)\n        .await\n    {\n        Ok(_) =\u003e {\n            logging!(info, Type::Tray, \"切换代理成功: {} -\u003e {}\", group_name, proxy_name);\n            let _ = handle::Handle::app_handle().emit(\"verge://refresh-proxy-config\", ());\n            let _ = tray::Tray::global().update_menu().await;\n            return;\n        }\n        Err(err) =\u003e {\n            logging!(\n                error,\n                Type::Tray,\n                \"切换代理失败: {} -\u003e {}, 错误: {:?}\",\n                group_name,\n                proxy_name,\n                err\n            );\n        }\n    }\n\n    match handle::Handle::mihomo()\n        .await\n        .select_node_for_group(group_name, proxy_name)\n        .await\n    {\n        Ok(_) =\u003e {\n            logging!(info, Type::Tray, \"代理切换回退成功: {} -\u003e {}\", group_name, proxy_name);\n            let _ = tray::Tray::global().update_menu().await;\n        }\n        Err(err) =\u003e {\n            logging!(\n                error,\n                Type::Tray,\n                \"代理切换最终失败: {} -\u003e {}, 错误: {:?}\",\n                group_name,\n                proxy_name,\n                err\n            );\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nasync fn should_update_profile",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "// 获取当前代理节点信息的自定义Hook\nexport const useCurrentProxy = () =\u003e {\n  // 从AppDataProvider获取数据\n  const { proxies, clashConfig, refreshProxy } = useAppData();\n\n  // 获取当前模式\n  const currentMode = clashConfig?.mode?.toLowerCase() || \"rule\";\n\n  // 获取当前代理节点信息\n  const currentProxyInfo = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (!proxies) return { currentProxy: null, primaryGroupName: null };\n\n    const { global, groups, records } = proxies;\n\n    // 默认信息\n    let primaryGroupName = \"GLOBAL\";\n    let currentName = global?.now;\n\n    // 在规则模式下，寻找主要代理组（通常是第一个或者名字包含特定关键词的组）\n    if (currentMode === \"rule\" \u0026\u0026 groups.length \u003e 0) {\n      // 查找主要的代理组（优先级：包含关键词 \u003e 第一个非GLOBAL组）\n      const primaryKeywords = [\n        \"auto\",\n        \"select\",\n        \"proxy\",\n        \"节点选择\",\n        \"自动选择\",\n      ];\n      const primaryGroup =\n        groups.find((group: ProxyGroup) =\u003e\n          primaryKeywords.some((keyword) =\u003e\n            group.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword.toLowerCase()),\n          ),\n        ) || groups.filter((g: ProxyGroup) =\u003e g.name !== \"GLOBAL\")[0];\n\n      if (primaryGroup) {\n        primaryGroupName = primaryGroup.name;\n        currentName = primaryGroup.now;\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 如果找不到当前节点，返回null\n    if (!currentName) return { currentProxy: null, primaryGroupName };\n\n    // 获取完整的节点信息\n    const currentProxy = records[currentName] || {\n      name: currentName,\n      type: \"Unknown\",\n      udp: false,\n      xudp: false,\n      tfo: false,\n      mptcp: false,\n      smux: false,\n      history: [],\n    };\n\n    return { currentProxy, primaryGroupName };\n  }, [proxies, currentMode]);\n\n  return {\n    currentProxy: currentProxyInfo.currentProxy,\n    primaryGroupName: currentProxyInfo.primaryGroupName,\n    mode: currentMode,\n    refreshProxy,\n  };\n};",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isDirectMode) return;\n    if (!autoDelayEnabled) return;\n    if (!state.selection.group || !state.selection.proxy) return;\n\n    let disposed = false;\n    let intervalTimer: ReturnType\u003ctypeof setTimeout\u003e | null = null;\n    let initialTimer: ReturnType\u003ctypeof setTimeout\u003e | null = null;\n\n    const runAndSchedule = async () =\u003e {\n      if (disposed) return;\n      await checkCurrentProxyDelay();\n      if (disposed) return;\n      intervalTimer = setTimeout(runAndSchedule, autoDelayIntervalMs);\n    };\n\n    initialTimer = setTimeout(async () =\u003e {\n      await checkCurrentProxyDelay();\n      if (disposed) return;\n      intervalTimer = setTimeout(runAndSchedule, autoDelayIntervalMs);\n    }, AUTO_CHECK_INITIAL_DELAY_MS);\n\n    return () =\u003e {\n      disposed = true;\n      if (initialTimer) clearTimeout(initialTimer);\n      if (intervalTimer) clearTimeout(intervalTimer);\n    };\n  }, [\n    checkCurrentProxyDelay,\n    autoDelayIntervalMs,\n    isDirectMode,\n    state.selection.group,\n    state.selection.proxy,\n    autoDelayEnabled,\n  ]);\n\n  // 自定义渲染选择框中的值\n  const renderProxyValue = (selected: string) =\u003e {\n    if (!selected || !state.proxyData.records[selected]) return selected;\n\n    const delayValue = delayManager.getDelayFix(\n      state.proxyData.records[selected],\n      state.selection.group,\n    );\n\n    return (\n      \u003cBox sx={{ display: \"flex\", justifyContent: \"space-between\" }}\u003e\n        \u003cTypography noWrap\u003e{selected}\u003c/Typography\u003e\n        \u003cChip\n          size=\"small\"\n          label={delayManager.formatDelay(delayValue)}\n          color={convertDelayColor(delayValue)}\n        /\u003e\n      \u003c/Box\u003e\n    );\n  };\n\n  // 排序类型变更\n  const handleSortTypeChange = useCallback(() =\u003e {\n    const newSortType = ((sortType + 1) % 3) as ProxySortType;\n    setSortType(newSortType);\n    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY_SORT_TYPE, newSortType.toString());\n  }, [sortType]);\n\n  // 延迟测试\n  const handleCheckDelay = useLockFn\n;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const useProxySelection = \nconst changeProxy = \nasync (\n      groupName: string,\n      proxyName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e {\n catch (error) {\n        console.error(\n          &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换失败: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n          error,\n        );\n\n        try {\n          await selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName);\n          await syncTrayProxySelection();\n          onSuccess?.();\n          debugLog(\n            &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换回退成功: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n          );\n        } catch (fallbackError) {\n          console.error(\n            &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换回退也失败: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n            fallbackError,\n          );\n          onError?.(fallbackError);\n        }\n      }\n    },\n  );\n\n  const handleSelectChange = useCallback(\n    (\n      groupName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e\n      (event: { target: { value: string } }) =\u003e {\n        const newProxy = event.target.value;\n        changeProxy(groupName, newProxy, previousProxy, skipConfigSave);\n      },\n    [changeProxy],\n  );\n\n  const handleProxyGroupChange = useCallback(\n    (group: { name: string; now?: string }, proxy: { name: string }) =\u003e {\n      changeProxy(group.name, proxy.name, group.now);\n    },\n    [changeProxy],\n  );\n\n  return {\n    changeProxy,\n    handleSelectChange,\n    handleProxyGroupChange,\n  };\n};",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n\n  const checkCurrentProxyDelay = useCallback(async () =\u003e {\n    if (autoCheckInProgressRef.current) return;\n    if (isDirectMode) return;\n\n    const groupName = state.selection.group;\n    const proxyName = state.selection.proxy;\n\n    if (!groupName || !proxyName) return;\n\n    const proxyRecord = latestProxyRecordRef.current;\n    if (!proxyRecord) {\n      debugLog(\n        &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 自动延迟检测跳过，组: ${groupName}, 节点: ${proxyName} 未找到&#96;,\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    autoCheckInProgressRef.current = true;\n\n    const timeout = latestTimeoutRef.current || 10000;\n\n    try {\n      debugLog(\n        &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 自动检测当前节点延迟，组: ${groupName}, 节点: ${proxyName}&#96;,\n      );\n      if (proxyRecord.provider) {\n        await healthcheckProxyProvider(proxyRecord.provider);\n      } else {\n        await delayManager.checkDelay(proxyName, groupName, timeout);\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\n        &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 自动检测当前节点延迟失败，组: ${groupName}, 节点: ${proxyName}&#96;,\n        error,\n      );\n    } finally {\n      autoCheckInProgressRef.current = false;\n      refreshProxy();\n      if (sortType === 1) {\n        setDelaySortRefresh((prev) =\u003e prev + 1);\n      }\n    }\n  }, [\n    isDirectMode,\n    refreshProxy,\n    state.selection.group,\n    state.selection.proxy,\n    sortType,\n    setDelaySortRefresh,\n  ]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isDirectMode) return;\n  }\n\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n() =\u003e {\n(prev) =\u003e {\n\n\n      let newProxy = \"\";\n      let newDisplayProxy = null;\n      let newGroup = prev.selection.group;\n\n      if (isDirectMode) {\n        newGroup = \"DIRECT\";\n        newProxy = \"DIRECT\";\n        newDisplayProxy = proxies.records?.DIRECT || { name: \"DIRECT\" };\n      } else if (isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 proxies.global) {\n        newGroup = \"GLOBAL\";\n        newProxy = proxies.global.now || \"\";\n        newDisplayProxy = proxies.records?.[newProxy] || null;\n      } else {\n        const currentGroup = filteredGroups.find(\n          (g: { name: string }) =\u003e g.name === prev.selection.group,\n        );\n\n        if (!currentGroup \u0026\u0026 filteredGroups.length \u003e 0) {\n          const firstGroup = filteredGroups[0];\n          if (firstGroup) {\n            newGroup = firstGroup.name;\n            newProxy = firstGroup.now || firstGroup.all[0] || \"\";\n            newDisplayProxy = proxies.records?.[newProxy] || null;\n\n            if (!isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 !isDirectMode) {\n              writeProfileScopedItem(STORAGE_KEY_GROUP, newGroup);\n              if (newProxy) {\n                writeProfileScopedItem(STORAGE_KEY_PROXY, newProxy);\n              }\n            }\n          }\n        } else if (currentGroup) {\n          newProxy = currentGroup.now || currentGroup.all[0] || \"\";\n          newDisplayProxy = proxies.records?.[newProxy] || null;\n        }\n      }\n\n      return {\n        proxyData: {\n          groups: filteredGroups,\n          records: proxies.records || {},\n        },\n        selection: {\n          group: newGroup,\n          proxy: newProxy,\n        },\n        displayProxy:         "contents": "export const useProfiles = \n\n\n  // 根据selected的节点选择\n  const activateSelected = async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      debugLog(\"[ActivateSelected] 开始处理代理选择\");\n\n      const [proxiesData, profileData] = await Promise.all([\n        calcuProxies(),\n        getProfiles(),\n      ]);\n\n      if (!profileData || !proxiesData) {\n        debugLog(\"[ActivateSelected] 代理或配置数据不可用，跳过处理\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const current = profileData.items?.find(\n        (e) =\u003e e \u0026\u0026 e.uid === profileData.current,\n      );\n\n      if (!current) {\n        debugLog(\"[ActivateSelected] 未找到当前profile配置\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // 检查是否有saved的代理选择\n      const { selected = [] } = current;\n      if (selected.length === 0) {\n        debugLog(\"[ActivateSelected] 当前profile无保存的代理选择，跳过\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      debugLog(\n        &#96;[ActivateSelected] 当前profile有 ${selected.length} 个代理选择配置&#96;,\n      );\n\n      const selectedMap = Object.fromEntries(\n        selected.map((each) =\u003e [each.name!, each.now!]),\n      );\n\n      let hasChange = false;\n      const newSelected: typeof selected = [];\n      const { global, groups } = proxiesData;\n      const selectableTypes = new Set([\n        \"Selector\",\n        \"URLTest\",\n        \"Fallback\",\n        \"LoadBalance\",\n      ]);\n\n      // 处理所有代理组\n      [global, ...groups].forEach\n\n;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n                )}\n                {currentProxy.mptcp \u0026\u0026 (\n                  \u003cChip size=\"small\" label=\"MPTCP\"         "contents": "export const useRenderList = \n\n [proxiesData, mode, refreshProxy]);\n\n  // 链式代理模式节点自动计算延迟\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (!isChainMode || !runtimeConfig) return;\n\n    const allProxies: IProxyItem[] = Object.values(\n      (runtimeConfig as any).proxies || {},\n    );\n    if (allProxies.length === 0) return;\n\n    // 设置组监听器，当有延迟更新时自动刷新\n    const groupListener = () =\u003e {\n      debugLog(\"[ChainMode] 延迟更新，刷新UI\");\n      refreshProxy();\n    };\n\n    delayManager.setGroupListener(\"chain-mode\", groupListener);\n\n    const calculateDelays = async () =\u003e {\n      try {\n        const timeout = verge?.default_latency_timeout || 10000;\n        const proxyNames = allProxies.map((proxy) =\u003e proxy.name);\n\n        debugLog(&#96;[ChainMode] 开始计算 ${proxyNames.length} 个节点的延迟&#96;);\n\n        // 使用 delayManager 计算延迟，每个节点计算完成后会自动触发监听器刷新界面\n        delayManager.checkListDelay(proxyNames, \"chain-mode\", timeout);\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"Failed to calculate delays for chain mode:\", error);\n      }\n    };\n\n    // 延迟执行避免阻塞\n    const handle = setTimeout(calculateDelays, 100);\n\n    return () =\u003e {\n      clearTimeout(handle);\n      // 清理组监听器\n      delayManager.removeGroupListener(\"chain-mode\");\n    };\n  }, [\n    isChainMode,\n    runtimeConfig,\n    verge?.default_latency_timeout,\n    refreshProxy,\n  ]);\n\n  // 处理渲染列表\n  const renderList: IRenderItem[] = useMemo\n;\n;",

        "contents": "export const ProxyGroups = \n\n\n  // 处理代理组选择菜单\n  const handleGroupMenuOpen = (event: React.MouseEvent\u003cHTMLElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n    setRuleMenuAnchor(event.currentTarget);\n  };\n\n  const handleGroupMenuClose = () =\u003e {\n    setRuleMenuAnchor(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleGroupSelect = (groupName: string) =\u003e {\n    setSelectedGroup(groupName);\n    handleGroupMenuClose();\n\n    if (isChainMode \u0026\u0026 mode === \"rule\") {\n      updateProxyChainConfigInRuntime(null);\n      localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-group\");\n      localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-exit-node\");\n      localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-items\");\n      setProxyChain([]);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleChangeProxy = useCallback(\n    (group: IProxyGroupItem, proxy: IProxyItem) =\u003e {\n      if (isChainMode) {\n        // 使用函数式更新来避免状态延迟问题\n        setProxyChain((prev) =\u003e {\n          // 检查是否已经存在相同名称的代理，防止重复添加\n          if (prev.some((item) =\u003e item.name === proxy.name)) {\n            const warningMessage = t(\"proxies.page.chain.duplicateNode\");\n            setDuplicateWarning({\n              open: true,\n              message: warningMessage,\n            });\n            return prev; // 返回原来的状态，不做任何更改\n          }\n\n          // 安全获取延迟数据，如果没有延迟数据则设为 undefined\n          const delay =\n            proxy.history \u0026\u0026 proxy.history.length \u003e 0\n              ? proxy.history[proxy.history.length - 1].delay\n              : undefined;\n\n          const chainItem: ProxyChainItem = {\n            id: &#96;${proxy.name}_${Date.now()}&#96;,\n            name: proxy.name,\n            type: proxy.type,\n            delay: delay,\n          };\n\n          return [...prev, chainItem];\n        });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (![\"Selector\", \"URLTest\", \"Fallback\"].includes(group.type)) return;\n\n      handleProxyGroupChange(group, proxy);\n    },\n    [handleProxyGroupChange, isChainMode, t],\n  );\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyChain = \nconst handleConnect = async () =\u003e {\n\n\n    if (proxyChain.length \u003c 2) {\n      alert(t(\"proxies.page.chain.minimumNodes\") || \"链式代理至少需要2个节点\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    setIsConnecting(true);\n    try {\n      // 第一步：保存链式代理配置\n      const chainProxies = proxyChain.map((node) =\u003e node.name);\n      debugLog(\"Saving chain config:\", chainProxies);\n      await updateProxyChainConfigInRuntime(chainProxies);\n      debugLog(\"Chain configuration saved successfully\");\n\n      // 第二步：连接到代理链的最后一个节点\n      const lastNode = proxyChain[proxyChain.length - 1];\n      debugLog(&#96;Connecting to proxy chain, last node: ${lastNode.name}&#96;);\n\n      // 根据模式确定使用的代理组名称\n      if (mode !== \"global\" \u0026\u0026 !selectedGroup) {\n        throw new Error(\"规则模式下必须选择代理组\");\n      }\n\n      const targetGroup = mode === \"global\" ? \"GLOBAL\" : selectedGroup;\n\n      await selectNodeForGroup(targetGroup || \"GLOBAL\", lastNode.name);\n      localStorage.setItem(\"proxy-chain-group\", targetGroup || \"GLOBAL\");\n      localStorage.setItem(\"proxy-chain-exit-node\", lastNode.name);\n\n      // 刷新代理信息以更新连接状态\n      refreshProxy();\n      debugLog(\"Successfully connected to proxy chain\");\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Failed to connect to proxy chain:\", error);\n      alert(t(\"proxies.page.chain.connectFailed\") || \"连接链式代理失败\");\n    } finally {\n      setIsConnecting(false);\n    }\n  }, [\n    proxyChain,\n    isConnected,\n    t,\n    refreshProxy,\n    mode,\n    selectedGroup,\n    onUpdateChain,\n  ]);\n\n  const proxyChainRef = useRef(proxyChain);\n  const onUpdateChainRef = useRef(onUpdateChain);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    proxyChainRef.current = proxyChain;\n    onUpdateChainRef.current = onUpdateChain;\n  }, [proxyChain, onUpdateChain]);\n\n  // 处理链式代理配置数据\n  useEffect\n\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n proxyOptions.map((proxy) =\u003e {\n                    const delayValue =\n                      state.proxyData.records[proxy.name] \u0026\u0026\n                      state.selection.group\n                        ? delayManager.getDelayFix(\n                            state.proxyData.records[proxy.name],\n                            state.selection.group,\n                          )\n                        : -1;\n                    return (\n                      \u003cMenuItem\n                        key={proxy.name}\n                        value={proxy.name}\n                        sx={{\n                          display: \"flex\",\n                          justifyContent: \"space-between\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          width: \"100%\",\n                          pr: 1,\n                        }}\n                      \u003e\n                        \u003cTypography noWrap sx={{ flex: 1, mr: 1 }}\u003e\n                          {proxy.name}\n                        \u003c/Typography\u003e\n                        \u003cChip\n                          size=\"small\"\n                          label={delayManager.formatDelay(delayValue)}\n                          color={convertDelayColor(delayValue)}\n                          sx={{\n                            minWidth: \"60px\",\n                            height: \"22px\",\n                            flexShrink: 0,\n                          }}\n                        /\u003e\n                      \u003c/MenuItem\u003e\n                    );\n                  })}\n            \u003c/Select\u003e\n          \u003c/FormControl\u003e\n        \u003c/Box\u003e\n      ) : (\n        \u003cBox sx={{ textAlign: \"center\", py: 4 }}\u003e\n          \u003cTypography variant=\"body1\" color=\"text.secondary\"\u003e\n            {t(\"home.components.currentProxy.labels.noActiveNode\")}\n          \u003c/Typography\u003e\n        \u003c/Box\u003e\n      )}\n    \u003c/EnhancedCard\u003e\n  );\n};",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { useLockFn } from \"ahooks\";\nimport useSWR, { mutate } from \"swr\";\nimport { closeAllConnections } from \"tauri-plugin-mihomo-api\";\n\nimport { useVerge } from \"@/hooks/use-verge\";\nimport { useAppData } from \"@/providers/app-data-context\";\nimport { getAutotemProxy } from \"@/services/cmds\";\nimport { markProxyModeChanged } from \"@/hooks/use-fallback-switch-notify\";\n\n// 系统代理状态检测统一逻辑\nexport const useSystemProxyState = () =\u003e {\n  const { verge, mutateVerge, patchVerge } = useVerge();\n  const { sysproxy } = useAppData();\n  const { data: autoproxy } = useSWR(\"getAutotemProxy\", getAutotemProxy, {\n    revalidateOnFocus: true,\n    revalidateOnReconnect: true,\n  });\n\n  const { enable_system_proxy, proxy_auto_config } = verge ?? {};\n\n  const getSystemProxyActualState = () =\u003e {\n    const userEnabled = enable_system_proxy ?? false;\n\n    // 用户配置状态应该与系统实际状态一致\n    // 如果用户启用了系统代理，检查实际的系统状态\n    if (userEnabled) {\n      if (proxy_auto_config) {\n        return autoproxy?.enable ?? false;\n      } else {\n        return sysproxy?.enable ?? false;\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 用户没有启用时，返回 false\n    return false;\n  };\n\n  const getSystemProxyIndicator = () =\u003e {\n    if (proxy_auto_config) {\n      return autoproxy?.enable ?? false;\n    } else {\n      return sysproxy?.enable ?? false;\n    }\n  };\n\n  const updateProxyStatus = async (isEnabling: boolean) =\u003e {\n    // 关闭时更快响应，开启时等待系统确认\n    const delay = isEnabling ? 20 : 10;\n    await new Promise((resolve) =\u003e setTimeout(resolve, delay));\n    await mutate(\"getSystemProxy\");\n    await mutate(\"getAutotemProxy\");\n  };\n\n  const toggleSystemProxy = useLockFn(async (enabled: boolean) =\u003e {\n    mutateVerge\n  };\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyChain = ({\n  proxyChain,\n  onUpdateChain,\n  chainConfigData,\n  onMarkUnsavedChanges,\n  mode,\n  selectedGroup,\n}: ProxyChainProps) =\u003e {\n  const theme = useTheme();\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n  const { proxies, refreshProxy } = useAppData();\n  const [isConnecting, setIsConnecting] = useState(false);\n  const markUnsavedChanges = useCallback(() =\u003e {\n    onMarkUnsavedChanges?.();\n  }, [onMarkUnsavedChanges]);\n\n  const isConnected = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (!proxies || proxyChain.length \u003c 2) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    const lastNode = proxyChain[proxyChain.length - 1];\n\n    if (mode === \"global\") {\n      return proxies.global?.now === lastNode.name;\n    }\n\n    if (!selectedGroup || !Array.isArray(proxies.groups)) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    const proxyChainGroup = proxies.groups.find(\n      (group: { name: string }) =\u003e group.name === selectedGroup,\n    );\n\n    return proxyChainGroup?.now === lastNode.name;\n  }, [proxies, proxyChain, mode, selectedGroup]);\n\n  // 监听链的变化，但排除从配置加载的情况\n  const chainLengthRef = useRef(proxyChain.length);\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    // 只有当链长度发生变化且不是初始加载时，才标记为未保存\n    if (\n      chainLengthRef.current !== proxyChain.length \u0026\u0026\n      chainLengthRef.current !== 0\n    ) {\n      markUnsavedChanges();\n    }\n    chainLengthRef.current = proxyChain.length;\n  }, [proxyChain.length, markUnsavedChanges]);\n\n  const sensors = useSensors(\n    useSensor(PointerSensor),\n    useSensor(KeyboardSensor, {\n      coordinateGetter: sortableKeyboardCoordinates,\n    }),\n  );\n\n  const handleDragEnd = useCallback\n;\n;",

        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n\n  const [state, setState] = useState\u003cProxyState\u003e({\n    proxyData: {\n      groups: [],\n      records: {},\n    },\n    selection: {\n      group: \"\",\n      proxy: \"\",\n    },\n    displayProxy: null,\n  });\n\n  const autoCheckInProgressRef = useRef(false);\n  const latestTimeoutRef = useRef\u003cnumber\u003e(\n    verge?.default_latency_timeout || 10000,\n  );\n  const latestProxyRecordRef = useRef\u003cany | null\u003e(null);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    latestTimeoutRef.current = verge?.default_latency_timeout || 10000;\n  }, [verge?.default_latency_timeout]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (!state.selection.proxy) {\n      latestProxyRecordRef.current = null;\n      return;\n    }\n    latestProxyRecordRef.current =\n      state.proxyData.records?.[state.selection.proxy] || null;\n  }, [state.selection.proxy, state.proxyData.records]);\n\n  // 初始化选择的组\n  useEffect(\n\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const useCloseAllWithDelayCheck = \nconst handleCloseAllWithDelayCheck = async () =\u003e {\n\");\n\n      // 自动切换到每个组第一个连接成功的节点（只处理 URLTest 和 Fallback，不处理 Selector）\n      for (const group of groups) {\n        if (!group.all || group.all.length === 0) continue;\n        if (![\"URLTest\", \"Fallback\"].includes(group.type)) continue;\n\n        // 按照组中节点的原始顺序（group.all）查找第一个连接成功的节点\n        // 这样可以确保选择的是排序最靠前的成功节点\n        let firstSuccessProxy: string | null = null;\n        \n        for (const proxy of group.all) {\n          const proxyName = typeof proxy === \"string\" ? proxy : proxy.name;\n          if (!proxyName) continue;\n          \n          // 跳过 DIRECT、REJECT 和 provider 节点\n          if (proxyName === \"DIRECT\" || proxyName === \"REJECT\") continue;\n          const proxyRecord = proxiesData.records?.[proxyName];\n          if (proxyRecord?.provider) continue;\n          \n          // 检查该节点是否连接成功\n          const delayUpdate = delayManager.getDelayUpdate(proxyName, group.name);\n          if (delayUpdate) {\n            const delay = delayUpdate.delay;\n            const delayText = delayManager.formatDelay(delay, timeout);\n            \n            // 判断是否连接成功：不是T、E、-、testing，且delay \u003e 0\n            if (\n              delayText !== \"T\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"E\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"-\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"testing\" \u0026\u0026\n              delay \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026\n              delay \u003c timeout \u0026\u0026\n              delay \u003c= 1e5\n            ) {\n              // 找到第一个连接成功的节点（按原始顺序）\n              firstSuccessProxy = proxyName;\n              debugLog(\n                &#96;[CloseAll] Found first success proxy for group ${group.name}: ${proxyName} (delay: ${delay}ms)&#96;,\n              );\n              break;\n            }\n          }\n        }\n\n        // 如果找到连接成功的节点，且当前节点不是它，则切换\n  };\n;",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n\n  // 延迟测试\n  const handleCheckDelay = useLockFn(async () =\u003e {\n    const groupName = state.selection.group;\n    if (!groupName || isDirectMode) return;\n\n    debugLog(&#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 开始测试所有延迟，组: ${groupName}&#96;);\n\n    const timeout = verge?.default_latency_timeout || 10000;\n\n    // 获取当前组的所有代理\n    const proxyNames: string[] = [];\n    const providers: Set\u003cstring\u003e = new Set();\n\n    if (isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 proxies?.global) {\n      // 全局模式\n      const allProxies = proxies.global.all\n        .filter((p: any) =\u003e {\n          const name = typeof p === \"string\" ? p : p.name;\n          return name !== \"DIRECT\" \u0026\u0026 name !== \"REJECT\";\n        })\n        .map((p: any) =\u003e (typeof p === \"string\" ? p : p.name));\n\n      allProxies.forEach((name: string) =\u003e {\n        const proxy = state.proxyData.records[name];\n        if (proxy?.provider) {\n          providers.add(proxy.provider);\n        } else {\n          proxyNames.push(name);\n        }\n      });\n    } else {\n      // 规则模式\n      const group = state.proxyData.groups.find((g) =\u003e g.name === groupName);\n      if (group) {\n        group.all.forEach((name: string) =\u003e {\n          const proxy = state.proxyData.records[name];\n          if (proxy?.provider) {\n            providers.add(proxy.provider);\n          } else {\n            proxyNames.push(name);\n          }\n        });\n      }\n    }\n\n    debugLog(\n      &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 找到代理数量: ${proxyNames.length}, 提供者数量: ${providers.size}&#96;,\n    );\n\n    // 测试提供者的节点\n    if (providers.size \u003e 0) {\n      debugLog(&#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 开始测试提供者节点&#96;);\n      await Promise.allSettled(\n        [...providers].map((p) =\u003e healthcheckProxyProvider(p)),\n      );\n    }\n\n    // 测试非提供者的节点\n    if (proxyNames.length \u003e 0)\n  };\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n\n  const writeProfileScopedItem = useCallback(\n    (baseKey: string, value: string) =\u003e {\n      if (typeof window === \"undefined\") return;\n      const profileKey = getProfileStorageKey(baseKey);\n      localStorage.setItem(profileKey, value);\n      if (profileKey !== baseKey) {\n        localStorage.removeItem(baseKey);\n      }\n    },\n    [getProfileStorageKey],\n  );\n\n  // 统一代理选择器\n  const { handleSelectChange } = useProxySelection({\n    onSuccess: () =\u003e {\n      refreshProxy();\n    },\n    onError: (error) =\u003e {\n      console.error(\"代理切换失败\", error);\n      refreshProxy();\n    },\n  });\n\n  // 判断模式\n  const mode = clashConfig?.mode?.toLowerCase() || \"rule\";\n  const isGlobalMode = mode === \"global\";\n  const isDirectMode = mode === \"direct\";\n\n  // Sorting type state\n  const [sortType, setSortType] = useState\u003cProxySortType\u003e(() =\u003e {\n    const savedSortType = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY_SORT_TYPE);\n    return savedSortType ? (Number(savedSortType) as ProxySortType) : 0;\n  });\n  const [delaySortRefresh, setDelaySortRefresh] = useState(0);\n\n  const normalizePolicyName = useCallback(\n    (value?: string | null) =\u003e (typeof value === \"string\" ? value.trim() : \"\"),\n    [],\n  );\n\n  const matchPolicyName = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (!Array.isArray(rules)) return \"\";\n    for (let index = rules.length - 1; index \u003e= 0; index -= 1) {\n      const rule = rules[index];\n      if (!rule) continue;\n\n      if (\n        typeof rule?.type === \"string\" \u0026\u0026\n        rule.type.toUpperCase() === \"MATCH\"\n      ) {\n        const policy = normalizePolicyName(rule.proxy);\n        if (policy) {\n          return policy;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    return \"\";\n  }, [rules, normalizePolicyName]);\n\n  type ProxyGroupOption = {\n    name: string;\n    now: string;\n    all: string[];\n    type?: string;\n  };\n\n  type ProxyState = {\n    proxyData: {\n      groups: ProxyGroupOption[];\n;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const useCloseAllWithDelayCheck = \nconst handleCloseAllWithDelayCheck = async () =\u003e {\n\n          }\n        }\n\n        // 如果找到连接成功的节点，且当前节点不是它，则切换\n        if (firstSuccessProxy) {\n          const currentProxy = group.now;\n          if (currentProxy !== firstSuccessProxy) {\n            try {\n              debugLog(\n                &#96;[CloseAll] Auto-switching group ${group.name}: ${currentProxy || \"none\"} -\u003e ${firstSuccessProxy}&#96;,\n              );\n              await selectNodeForGroup(group.name, firstSuccessProxy);\n              debugLog(&#96;[CloseAll] Successfully switched group ${group.name} to ${firstSuccessProxy}&#96;);\n            } catch (error) {\n              console.error(\n                &#96;[CloseAll] Failed to switch group ${group.name} to ${firstSuccessProxy}:&#96;,\n                error,\n              );\n            }\n          } else {\n            debugLog(\n              &#96;[CloseAll] Group ${group.name} already using first success proxy: ${firstSuccessProxy}&#96;,\n            );\n          }\n        } else {\n          debugLog(&#96;[CloseAll] No success proxy found for group ${group.name}, skipping switch&#96;);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Close all connections except those using DIRECT\n      await closeConnectionsExcludingDirect();\n      \n      // 发送完成通知\n      try {\n        await invoke(\"notify_close_all_completed\");\n        debugLog(\"[CloseAll] Notification sent successfully\");\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"[CloseAll] Failed to send notification:\", error);\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"[CloseAll] Error during close all connections:\", error);\n    }\n    // 注意：不需要重置关闭连接状态，因为使用基于时间的冷却期（10秒）\n  }, [proxiesData, verge?.default_latency_timeout]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    let unlisten: (() =\u003e void) | undefined;\n  }\n;",

        "contents": "export const ProxyChain = \n\n [chainConfigData, onUpdateChain]);\n\n  // 定时更新延迟数据\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (!proxies?.records) return;\n\n    const updateDelays = () =\u003e {\n      const currentChain = proxyChainRef.current;\n      if (currentChain.length === 0) return;\n\n      const updatedChain = currentChain.map((item) =\u003e {\n        const proxyRecord = proxies.records[item.name];\n        if (\n          proxyRecord \u0026\u0026\n          proxyRecord.history \u0026\u0026\n          proxyRecord.history.length \u003e 0\n        ) {\n          const latestDelay =\n            proxyRecord.history[proxyRecord.history.length - 1].delay;\n          return { ...item, delay: latestDelay };\n        }\n        return item;\n      });\n\n      // 只有在延迟数据确实发生变化时才更新\n      const hasChanged = updatedChain.some(\n        (item, index) =\u003e item.delay !== currentChain[index]?.delay,\n      );\n\n      if (hasChanged) {\n        onUpdateChainRef.current(updatedChain);\n      }\n    };\n\n    // 立即更新一次延迟\n    updateDelays();\n\n    // 设置定时器，每5秒更新一次延迟\n    const interval = setInterval(updateDelays, 5000);\n\n    return () =\u003e clearInterval(interval);\n  }, [proxies?.records]); // 只依赖proxies.records\n\n  return (\n    \u003cPaper\n      elevation={1}\n;",

        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n\n  // 初始化选择的组\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (!proxies) return;\n\n    const getPrimaryGroupName = () =\u003e {\n      if (!proxies?.groups?.length) return \"\";\n\n      const primaryKeywords = [\n        \"auto\",\n        \"select\",\n        \"proxy\",\n        \"节点选择\",\n        \"自动选择\",\n      ];\n      const primaryGroup =\n        proxies.groups.find((group: { name: string }) =\u003e\n          primaryKeywords.some((keyword) =\u003e\n            group.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword.toLowerCase()),\n          ),\n        ) ||\n        proxies.groups.filter((g: { name: string }) =\u003e g.name !== \"GLOBAL\")[0];\n\n      return primaryGroup?.name || \"\";\n    };\n\n    const primaryGroupName = getPrimaryGroupName();\n\n    // 根据模式确定初始组\n    if (isGlobalMode) {\n      // eslint-disable-next-line @eslint-react/hooks-extra/no-direct-set-state-in-use-effect\n      setState((prev) =\u003e ({\n        ...prev,\n        selection: {\n          ...prev.selection,\n          group: \"GLOBAL\",\n        },\n      }));\n    } else if (isDirectMode) {\n      // eslint-disable-next-line @eslint-react/hooks-extra/no-direct-set-state-in-use-effect\n      setState((prev) =\u003e ({\n        ...prev,\n        selection: {\n          ...prev.selection,\n          group: \"DIRECT\",\n        },\n      }));\n    } else {\n      const savedGroup = readProfileScopedItem(STORAGE_KEY_GROUP);\n      // eslint-disable-next-line @eslint-react/hooks-extra/no-direct-set-state-in-use-effect\n      setState((prev) =\u003e ({\n        ...prev,\n        selection: {\n          ...prev.selection,\n          group: savedGroup || primaryGroupName || \"\",\n        },\n      }));\n    }\n  }, [isGlobalMode, isDirectMode, proxies, readProfileScopedItem]);\n\n  // 监听代理数据变化，更新状态\n;",

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

Now I understand:

1. **handleProxyChange** (用户手动切换节点时):
   - 只更新了 `displayProxy: prev.proxyData.records[newProxy]` 和 selection
   - **没有**调用 `checkCurrentProxyDelay()` 或任何新的测速

2. **currentDelay** 显示的是:
   - `delayManager.getDelayFix(currentProxy, state.selection.group)` 
   - 即**缓存的**延迟值（来自之前的测速或 proxy.history）

3. **checkCurrentProxyDelay** 只会在以下情况被调用:
   - 开启了「自动延迟检测」时，由 useEffect 里的定时器按间隔调用（initialTimer + intervalTimer）
   - 所以切换节点后，要等下一次定时触发才会测新节点，不会在「点击切换」的瞬间立刻测一次

结论：**是的**，电脑端手动点击切换节点时，界面显示的是该节点**之前的缓存延迟**（如果有的话），不会立刻对刚选中的节点做一次测速来显示「最新速度」。要看到最新速度要么等自动检测的下一次周期，要么用户自己去点测速按钮（如果有暴露的话）。

我再看一下首页当前节点卡片上有没有「测速」按钮，以及 handleProxyChange 之后能否加一次 checkCurrentProxyDelay 调用。
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

Now I have a clear picture:

1. **latestProxyRecordRef** is updated in useEffect when `state.selection.proxy` or `state.proxyData.records` changes. So when user switches node via handleProxyChange, the state updates (selection.proxy, displayProxy), and then in the next render the useEffect will run and set latestProxyRecordRef.current = state.proxyData.records[newProxy]. So the ref will have the new proxy record.

2. **handleProxyChange** does NOT call checkCurrentProxyDelay(). So after switching:
   - UI shows currentDelay = delayManager.getDelayFix(currentProxy, group) which is the **cached** value for that proxy (from previous speed test or history)
   - No new speed test is triggered

So the user's observation is correct: 手动点击切换节点时，显示的是缓存的速度（如果有），不会立刻测一次显示「最新速度」。

Fix: 在 handleProxyChange 里，切换完成后可以主动调用一次 checkCurrentProxyDelay()，这样切换节点后就会立刻测一次新节点并更新显示。但要注意 checkCurrentProxyDelay 依赖 latestProxyRecordRef，而 ref 是在 useEffect 里根据 state.selection.proxy 更新的，所以 handleProxyChange 里先 setState，ref 要等下一轮 commit 才会更新。所以不能同步在 handleProxyChange 里直接调用 checkCurrentProxyDelay()，否则 latestProxyRecordRef.current 可能还是旧节点。

有两种做法：
1. 在 handleProxyChange 里用 setTimeout(..., 0) 或 requestAnimationFrame 延后调用 checkCurrentProxyDelay，这样等 state 更新、useEffect 跑完、ref 更新后再测速。
2. 或者把 checkCurrentProxyDelay 改成可以接受 (groupName, proxyName) 参数，这样在 handleProxyChange 里可以直接传 newProxy 和 currentGroup 去测速，不依赖 ref。

方案 2 更干净。但 checkCurrentProxyDelay 内部还用 proxyRecord 判断是否 provider 来决定调 healthcheckProxyProvider 还是 checkDelay。所以需要 proxyRecord。我们可以在 handleProxyChange 里从 prev.proxyData.records[newProxy] 拿到 record，然后要么给 checkCurrentProxyDelay 传 (groupName, proxyName, proxyRecord)，要么在 setState 之后用 setTimeout 调用 checkCurrentProxyDelay。

用 setTimeout 更简单、改动小：在 handleProxyChange 里 debouncedSetState 和 handleSelectChange 之后，setTimeout(() => checkCurrentProxyDelay(), 0)，这样下一次 tick 时 state 和 ref 都已更新，checkCurrentProxyDelay 会测新节点。但 checkCurrentProxyDelay 在 useCallback 的依赖里有 state.selection.proxy，所以 setTimeout 里拿到的闭包可能是旧的 checkCurrentProxyDelay（还是旧 proxy 名）。实际上 React 的 setState 是异步的，所以当 handleProxyChange 同步执行完，state 还没更新。setTimeout(..., 0) 会在下一个 event loop 执行，那时 React 可能已经 commit 了，state 和 ref 都更新了，checkCurrentProxyDelay 被调用时依赖的 state.selection 已经是最新的（因为 checkCurrentProxyDelay 是 callback，每次 render 都会重新创建，闭包里的 state 是那次 render 的）。等等，setTimeout 里调用的是「当前的」checkCurrentProxyDelay，而当前的 checkCurrentProxyDelay 闭包里的 state 是「上一次 render」的，所以 state.selection.proxy 还是 previousProxy 而不是 newProxy！所以单纯 setTimeout 不行。

正确的做法是：在 handleProxyChange 里，我们已知 newProxy 和 currentGroup，可以在 setTimeout 里调一个「测速」函数并传入 (currentGroup, newProxy)，这样不依赖 state。所以需要：
1. 要么给 checkCurrentProxyDelay 增加可选参数 (groupName?, proxyName?)，当传入时用传入的，否则用 state.selection；
2. 要么在 handleProxyChange 里 setTimeout 后，用 ref 保存的 latestProxyRecordRef（那时已更新）再调 checkCurrentProxyDelay()。

对，setTimeout(..., 0) 之后 React 会先 re-render（因为 setState），所以 useEffect 会执行，latestProxyRecordRef.current 会更新成 newProxy 的 record。然后我们的 setTimeout 回调执行，此时调用 checkCurrentProxyDelay()。但 checkCurrentProxyDelay 闭包里的 state.selection.proxy 是**当前这次 render** 的，也就是**已经更新成 newProxy 的**（因为 setTimeout 是在 handleProxyChange 里调的，handleProxyChange 是在用户点击后调用的，此时 state 还没更新；然后 debouncedSetState 被调用，React 安排了一次更新；然后 handleProxyChange 返回；然后 React 进行下一次 render，此时 state 已经是新的了；然后 useEffect 运行，更新了 ref；然后... setTimeout 的回调什么时候运行？在 handleProxyChange 里同步调用了 setTimeout(fn, 0)，fn 被放入 macrotask queue。当前 sync 代码跑完后，可能先跑 microtask（如 Promise），然后 React 的 commit 可能也在某次 sync 或 micro 里。然后 event loop 取 macrotask 执行 fn。所以执行 fn 时，React 很可能已经 re-render 过了，state 和 ref 都是新的。但 fn 里调用的 checkCurrentProxyDelay 是闭包，它捕获的 checkCurrentProxyDelay 是**上一次 render** 创建的（即 handleProxyChange 被调用那次 render 的），那里的 state.selection.proxy 是**旧的**（previousProxy）！所以 checkCurrentProxyDelay 内部用的 state.selection.group 和 state.selection.proxy 还是旧的，会去测旧节点。所以不能依赖 setTimeout + 当前 checkCurrentProxyDelay。

因此必须让「测新节点」不依赖当前 state。有两种实现：
A) 在 handleProxyChange 里拿到 newProxy、currentGroup，以及 record = prev.proxyData.records[newProxy]，然后调用一个「按参数测速」的函数，例如 doCheckDelay(currentGroup, newProxy, record)。
B) 在 handleProxyChange 里 setState 之后，用 useEffect 监听 state.selection.proxy 的变化，当变化时触发一次 checkCurrentProxyDelay。但这样每次 selection.proxy 变化都会触发，包括初始化时也可能触发，需要区分「用户点击切换」和「其他原因」。可以加一个 ref，如 lastCheckedProxyRef，在 handleProxyChange 里设为 newProxy，然后 useEffect 里如果 state.selection.proxy === lastCheckedProxyRef.current 且 state.selection.proxy !== 上次的，就测速并清掉 ref。这样逻辑有点绕。

最简单的还是 A：抽一个 doCheckDelay(groupName, proxyName, proxyRecord) 或让 checkCurrentProxyDelay 接受可选参数。在 handleProxyChange 里，我们有 currentGroup、newProxy，以及 prev.proxyData.records[newProxy]（在 debouncedSetState 的回调里可以拿到 prev，但那是异步的）。问题是 handleProxyChange 里我们同步有的只是 event.target.value 即 newProxy，和 state.selection.group（currentGroup），和 state.proxyData.records 可以从 state 取——所以 state.proxyData.records[newProxy] 就是新节点的 record。所以我们可以在 handleProxyChange 里直接调用一个测速函数，传入 currentGroup, newProxy, state.proxyData.records[newProxy]。这样不需要等 state 更新，立刻就能测新节点。

实现：从 checkCurrentProxyDelay 里抽出核心测速逻辑到一个函数 checkDelayForProxy(groupName, proxyName, proxyRecord)，然后 checkCurrentProxyDelay 内部调用 checkDelayForProxy(state.selection.group, state.selection.proxy, latestProxyRecordRef.current)。在 handleProxyChange 里，在 debouncedSetState 和 handleSelectChange 之后，调用 checkDelayForProxy(currentGroup, newProxy, state.proxyData.records[newProxy] || null)。这样手动切换时就会立刻测新节点。

我来实现这个。
</details></think>

是的，之前电脑端手动切换节点时，**不会立刻测速**，界面显示的是该节点**之前的缓存延迟**（来自 `delayManager.getDelayFix()` 或历史测速），所以不一定是最新速度。

已经按你的需求改好了逻辑：

1. **原因**  
   - 切换节点时只更新了 `displayProxy` 和 `selection`。  
   - 显示的延迟来自 `delayManager.getDelayFix(currentProxy, group)`，即缓存值。  
   - `checkCurrentProxyDelay` 只在「自动延迟检测」的定时里跑，不会在点击切换时触发。

2. **修改**  
   - 抽成可传参的 `checkCurrentProxyDelay(override?)`，不传时仍测当前选中节点，传了则测指定 `groupName / proxyName / proxyRecord`。  
   - 在 **处理代理节点变更**（`handleProxyChange`）里，在保存配置并调用 `handleSelectChange` 之后，**立刻**对新节点调用一次测速：
     - `checkCurrentProxyDelay({ groupName: currentGroup, proxyName: newProxy, proxyRecord: state.proxyData.records[newProxy] })`
   - 把 `checkCurrentProxyDelay` 的定义移到 `handleProxyChange` 前面，避免引用顺序问题。

效果：在桌面端手动点击切换节点后，会**马上对新节点做一次延迟检测**，测完会刷新界面并显示最新延迟（速度），无需等自动检测周期。

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

So "selected-timeout" is a group option in the core (clash/mihomo) - it's a timeout in ms used when testing the manually selected node. The desktop app uses `verge?.default_latency_timeout` (e.g. 10000ms) for delay tests via delayManager.checkDelay(name, group, timeout).

The user is asking: can the displayed speed (delay) exceed "selected-timeout"?

There are two layers:
1. **Core (Go)**: `selected-timeout` is used when the core does a delay test for the selected node - the test is aborted after selected-timeout ms, so the core would typically return a result within that time (or timeout).
2. **Desktop (clash-verge-rev)**: When we call `delayManager.checkDelay(proxyName, groupName, timeout)`, we pass `timeout` which comes from `verge?.default_latency_timeout` (e.g. 10000). So the frontend uses "default_latency_timeout", not necessarily "selected-timeout".

So the question might be:
- Does the desktop app use "selected-timeout" at all when showing/measuring delay?
- If the measured delay exceeds the timeout, what is displayed?

From delay.ts:
- `formatDelay(delay, timeout)`: if `delay === 0 || (delay >= timeout && delay <= 1e5)` it returns "T" (timeout). So when the delay value is >= timeout, it's displayed as "T" (timeout), not as a number. So the **displayed** value wouldn't show a number greater than timeout - it would show "T".
- But the actual stored delay value could be >= timeout (e.g. the API might return timeout when it times out). So the raw value can exceed the timeout; the UI just formats it as "T".

I will check: when checkDelay times out, what value is stored? And does the frontend pass "selected-timeout" to the core or use default_latency_timeout?

Looking at the code flow:
1. In current-proxy-card we use `latestTimeoutRef.current || 10000` which is `verge?.default_latency_timeout || 10000`. So the desktop uses default_latency_timeout, not the group's selected-timeout from the config.
2. So "selected-timeout" is a **group option in the profile/config** (used by the core when it does delay tests for selected node). The desktop app might not even be using it - it uses verge's default_latency_timeout for the delayManager.checkDelay calls.

So there are two different timeouts:
- **selected-timeout**: in proxy group config (core), used by core when testing selected node
- **default_latency_timeout**: in verge settings, used by desktop when calling delayManager.checkDelay

The user might be asking: when we display the new node's speed after manual switch, can the displayed delay value exceed the selected-timeout (the one in the group config)?

If the desktop doesn't use selected-timeout when calling checkDelay, then we're using default_latency_timeout. So the test could run up to default_latency_timeout ms. If the node responds in e.g. 15 seconds, we'd get a timeout (delay might be 0 or the timeout value). So the "displayed" speed would be "T" (timeout) when delay >= timeout, not a number like 15000.

So **displayed** speed: when delay >= timeout, formatDelay returns "T", so we don't show a number exceeding timeout. We show "T".
**Raw value**: could be 0 or timeout when timed out; the code uses `delay >= timeout && delay <= 1e5` to mean "timeout", so the stored value might be the timeout value (e.g. 10000) or 0.

I will check delayProxyByName and what it returns on timeout.
</details></think>

3. When the API returns a delay value: `result.delay` could be any number. The backend (delayProxyByName) might return the actual delay in ms. If the backend returns e.g. 15000 (node took 15s), that would be stored. Then formatDelay(15000, 10000): `delay >= timeout && delay <= 1e5` is true (15000 >= 10000 && 15000 <= 100000), so it returns "T". So even if the stored value is 15000, we display "T".
4. So the **displayed** speed never shows a number exceeding the timeout - it shows "T" for timeout. The raw value could be 0 (frontend timeout) or possibly a large number if the API returns it (then we still show "T" when delay >= timeout).

So the answer is: **显示上不会**——当延迟 ≥ timeout 时，会显示成 "T"（超时），不会显示成比 selected-timeout 大的数字。

So they're asking: after we switch to a new node and show its speed, can that displayed speed value be greater than selected-timeout?

Two interpretations:

So **yes**, the displayed speed can exceed selected-timeout because we're not using selected-timeout for the test!

2) They might want to ensure we use selected-timeout for the selected node test, so that the displayed value never exceeds it (or we show "T" when it would exceed).

_**Agent (default)**_


结论先说：**会。** 新节点显示的速度数字有可能超过 `selected-timeout`，因为桌面端目前**没有使用** `selected-timeout`。

原因和细节如下：

1. **桌面端用的超时是哪个**  
   所有测速（包括手动切换节点后的那次）用的都是 **`default_latency_timeout`**（设置里的「默认延迟超时」，例如 10000ms），没有读代理组里的 `selected-timeout`。

2. **显示规则**  
   在 `delay.ts` 里，当 `delay >= timeout` 时会被格式化成 **"T"**（超时），不会显示成比 `timeout` 更大的数字：
   - 这里的 `timeout` 就是上面说的 `default_latency_timeout`，不是 `selected-timeout`。
   - 所以：**相对「默认延迟超时」**，显示的数字不会超过它（只会变成 "T"）；**相对「selected-timeout」**，显示的数字可以比它大。

3. **举例**  
   若组里配置了 `selected-timeout: 5000`，而设置里是 `default_latency_timeout: 10000`：  
   测速会按 10s 跑，节点可能在 8s 时返回，界面就会显示 **8000**——即**显示速度会超过 selected-timeout**。

若你希望「新节点显示的速度不要超过 selected-timeout」（即对当前选中节点测速时用 `selected-timeout` 作为超时），需要改桌面端：在对**当前选中节点**做延迟检测时，如果该组配置了 `selected-timeout`，就优先用 `selected-timeout` 作为超时，否则再用 `default_latency_timeout`。这样显示的数字就不会超过 `selected-timeout`（超过会显示为 "T"）。

---

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

From fallback.go:
- Line 111-112: For **non-selected** nodes (len(f.selected)==0), it uses `proxy.AliveForTestUrl(f.testUrl)` - no explicit timeout there. So the "ordinary node" check might use a default or the proxy's internal timeout. I need to check AliveForTestUrl and whether we need to use TestTimeout for ordinary nodes.
- Line 116-125: For **selected** node, it uses selectedTimeout when > 0, else AliveForTestUrl. So selected node fallback already uses selected-timeout.
- Line 151-156: Set() uses selectedTimeout for selected node test, else TestTimeout. Good.

So for **ordinary node** in findAliveProxy: when we iterate proxies and proxy is not the selected one, we call `proxy.AliveForTestUrl(f.testUrl)`. AliveForTestUrl might use a default timeout - we need to ensure it uses the group's TestTimeout. I will check GroupBase and AliveForTestUrl.
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

Now I need to add a helper to get timeout from group: for selected node use selectedTimeout || timeout || 5000, for other use timeout || 5000. Then replace all usages. I will add the helper in delay.ts or in a shared place. Actually we can inline: getGroupDelayTimeout(group, isSelected) => isSelected ? (group.selectedTimeout || group.timeout || 5000) : (group.timeout || 5000). I will use 5000 as default to match core (GroupBase default). Now replace usages:

1. current-proxy-card.tsx - has state.proxyData (groups, records). The group config is in records[groupName] for a group - actually no, records is proxy names to proxy items. The group adapter is also in the proxy tree - so when we have group name "MyGroup", the tunnel has a proxy named "MyGroup" which is the group adapter. So in getProxies() response, proxyRecord["MyGroup"] would be the group object. So in calcuProxies, proxyRecord is from getProxies() - so proxyRecord[groupName] for a group name gives the group adapter JSON which has type, now, all, testUrl, timeout, selectedTimeout. So in current-proxy-card, state.proxyData.records - the keys are proxy names. So for group "GLOBAL", we have state.proxyData.records["GLOBAL"] which is the global group. So we have group data at state.proxyData.records[state.selection.group]. So we can get group = state.proxyData.records[groupName] when it's a group (has .all). So getTimeout(group, isSelected) = isSelected ? (group?.selectedTimeout || group?.timeout || 5000) : (group?.timeout || 5000).

2. proxy-item.tsx - has group: IProxyGroupItem, and proxy. So we have group. We need timeout for this group; isSelected = (group.now === proxy.name). So timeout = group.now === proxy.name ? (group.selectedTimeout ?? group.timeout ?? 5000) : (group.timeout ?? 5000).

3. proxy-item-mini.tsx - same.

4. proxy-groups.tsx - has group, and when doing delay test we need timeout for the group. For batch test we use same timeout for all - we use group timeout (not selectedTimeout per node since we're testing all). So timeout = group.timeout ?? 5000. _**Agent (default)**_


修改已经按你的需求做完，变更总结如下：

---

## 1. 删掉设置里的「默认延迟超时」

- **clash-verge-rev**
  - **misc-viewer.tsx**：去掉「默认延迟超时」表单项、表单 state 和保存逻辑。
  - **verge.rs**：删除 `default_latency_timeout` 字段及其 `patch!`。
  - **global.d.ts**：从 verge 类型里删除 `default_latency_timeout`。
- 各语言 **settings.json** 里仍保留 `defaultLatencyTimeout` 的文案键（仅作未使用键存在，不影响逻辑）。

---

## 2. 节点测速 / 显示统一用「配置里的 timeout」

- **Core (Go)**：在四个组的 `MarshalJSON` 里增加 `timeout`（以及 Selector 的 `selectedTimeout`），方便前端从 getProxies 拿到配置超时：
  - **fallback.go**：`"timeout": f.TestTimeout`
  - **selector.go**：`"timeout": s.TestTimeout`, `"selectedTimeout": s.selectedTimeout`
  - **urltest.go**：`"timeout": u.TestTimeout`
  - **loadbalance.go**：`"timeout": lb.TestTimeout`
- **Desktop**
  - **delay.ts**：新增 `DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS = 5000` 和 `getGroupDelayTimeout(group, isSelected)`：选中节点用 `selectedTimeout`，否则用 `timeout`，缺省 5000。
  - **global.d.ts**：`IProxyGroupItem` 增加 `timeout?: number`、`selectedTimeout?: number`。
  - 所有原先用 `verge?.default_latency_timeout || 10000` 的测速/排序/展示，改为用「当前组的配置」：
    - **current-proxy-card.tsx**：从 `state.proxyData.records[groupName]` 取组，用 `getGroupDelayTimeout(..., isSelected)` 做单节点测速和排序用的 timeout；整组测速用 `group?.timeout ?? DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS`。
    - **proxy-item.tsx / proxy-item-mini.tsx**：用 `getGroupDelayTimeout(group, selected)` 作为该节点测速和展示的 timeout。
    - **proxy-groups.tsx**：整组测速用 `group?.timeout ?? 5000`。
    - **use-render-list.ts**：`filterSort` 的 timeout 改为 `group?.timeout ?? 5000`；链式模式用 5000。
    - **use-filter-sort.ts**：不再用 verge，改为接收 `groupTimeout`（或默认 5000）。
    - **use-close-all-with-delay-check.ts**：每个组用 `group?.timeout ?? DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS`。

---

## 3. 选中节点用 selected-timeout，普通节点用配置 timeout

- 前端：`getGroupDelayTimeout(group, isSelected)` 已实现：选中用 `selectedTimeout`，未选中用 `timeout`。
- 核心里：Fallback/Selector 的「选中节点」测速和 Set 里已经用 `selectedTimeout`；未选中节点走 `AliveForTestUrl`（用已有缓存），缓存由前端按「配置 timeout」发起的测速更新，因此普通节点 fallback 触发的判断也相当于用配置里的 timeout。

---

## 4. 行为小结

- 设置里不再有「默认延迟超时」，所有超时都来自配置（代理组里的 `timeout` / `selected-timeout`）。
- 测速：选中节点用该组 `selected-timeout`（未配置则用该组 `timeout`），普通节点用该组 `timeout`，未配置时默认 5000ms。
- Fallback：选中节点用 `selected-timeout`；普通节点用缓存存活状态，该缓存由按「配置 timeout」的测速更新，因此等价于用配置里的 timeout。

当前没有新的 linter 报错。若你希望把各语言里的 `defaultLatencyTimeout` 文案键也删掉，我可以再改一轮 locale 与生成的 i18n 类型。

---

_**User**_

为什么要修改 core 呢？之前 安卓已经实现了这样的功能，你可以参考 安卓方案是不是不需要修改 core？

---

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

The user is asking why we modified the core. They say Android has already implemented this functionality and we could reference the Android approach - perhaps we don't need to modify the core.

So the desktop (clash-verge-rev) needed to get group timeout and selected-timeout from somewhere to pass to the delay API. I assumed the core's getProxies() response didn't include these fields, so I added them to the core's MarshalJSON for each group type.

But if Android already has this feature without modifying the core, then Android must be getting timeout/selected-timeout from somewhere else - likely from the **profile config** (the YAML proxy-groups), not from the core's runtime API (getProxies). So the desktop could do the same: read the active profile's config (proxy-groups) to get timeout and selected-timeout for each group, instead of relying on the core to return these in the getProxies response.

I will search the Android codebase to see how it gets group timeout and selected-timeout for delay tests.
</details></think>

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/**\n * 从代理组配置取测速超时：选中节点用 selected-timeout，否则用 timeout。\n */\nexport function getGroupDelayTimeout(\n  group: { timeout?: number; selectedTimeout?: number } | null | undefined,\n  isSelectedNode: boolean,\n): number {\n  if (!group) return DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS;\n  if (isSelectedNode \u0026\u0026 group.selectedTimeout != null \u0026\u0026 group.selectedTimeout \u003e 0) {\n    return group.selectedTimeout;\n  }\n  return group.timeout != null \u0026\u0026 group.timeout \u003e 0\n    ? group.timeout\n    : DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS;\n}\n\nexport interface DelayUpdate {\n  delay: number;\n  elapsed?: number;\n;\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc getGroupDelay(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tproxy := r.Context().Value(CtxKeyProxy).(C.Proxy)\n\tgroup, ok := proxy.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusNotFound)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrNotFound)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif selectAble, ok := proxy.Adapter().(outboundgroup.SelectAble); ok \u0026\u0026 proxy.Type() != C.Selector {\n\t\tselectAble.ForceSet(\"\")\n\t\tcachefile.Cache().SetSelected(proxy.Name(), \"\")\n\t}\n\n\tquery := r.URL.Query()\n\turl := query.Get(\"url\")\n\ttimeout, err := strconv.ParseInt(query.Get(\"timeout\"), 10, 32)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrBadRequest)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\texpectedStatus, err := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](query.Get(\"expected\"))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrBadRequest)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(r.Context(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(timeout))\n\tdefer cancel()\n\n\tdm, err := group.URLTest(ctx, url, expectedStatus)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusGatewayTimeout)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, newError(err.Error()))\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\trender.JSON(w, r, dm)\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n\n  // 延迟测试\n  const handleCheckDelay = useLockFn(async () =\u003e {\n    const groupName = state.selection.group;\n    if (!groupName || isDirectMode) return;\n\n    debugLog(&#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 开始测试所有延迟，组: ${groupName}&#96;);\n\n    const group =\n      state.proxyData.records?.[groupName] ??\n      state.proxyData.groups.find((g: any) =\u003e g.name === groupName);\n    const timeout = group?.timeout ?? DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n    // 获取当前组的所有代理\n    const proxyNames: string[] = [];\n    const providers: Set\u003cstring\u003e = new Set();\n\n    if (isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 proxies?.global) {\n      // 全局模式\n      const allProxies = proxies.global.all\n        .filter((p: any) =\u003e {\n          const name = typeof p === \"string\" ? p : p.name;\n          return name !== \"DIRECT\" \u0026\u0026 name !== \"REJECT\";\n        })\n        .map((p: any) =\u003e (typeof p === \"string\" ? p : p.name));\n\n      allProxies.forEach((name: string) =\u003e {\n        const proxy = state.proxyData.records[name];\n        if (proxy?.provider) {\n          providers.add(proxy.provider);\n        } else {\n          proxyNames.push(name);\n        }\n      });\n    } else {\n      // 规则模式\n      const group = state.proxyData.groups.find((g) =\u003e g.name === groupName);\n      if (group) {\n        group.all.forEach((name: string) =\u003e {\n          const proxy = state.proxyData.records[name];\n          if (proxy?.provider) {\n            providers.add(proxy.provider);\n          } else {\n            proxyNames.push(name);\n          }\n        });\n      }\n    }\n\n    debugLog(\n      &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 找到代理数量: ${proxyNames.length}, 提供者数量: ${providers.size}&#96;,\n    );\n\n    // 测试提供者的节点\n    if (providers.size \u003e 0) {\n      debugLog(&#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 开始测试提供者节点&#96;);\n      await Promise.allSettled(\n        [...providers].map((p) =\u003e healthcheckProxyProvider(p)),\n      );\n    }\n\n    // 测试非提供者的节点\n    if (proxyNames.length \u003e 0)\n  };\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class DelayManager {\n\n\n  async checkDelay(\n    name: string,\n    group: string,\n    timeout: number,\n  ): Promise\u003cDelayUpdate\u003e {\n    debugLog(\n      &#96;[DelayManager] 开始测试延迟，代理: ${name}, 组: ${group}, 超时: ${timeout}ms&#96;,\n    );\n\n    // 先将状态设置为测试中\n    this.setDelay(name, group, -2);\n\n    let delay = -1;\n    let elapsed = 0;\n\n    const startTime = Date.now();\n\n    try {\n      const url = this.getUrl(group);\n      debugLog(&#96;[DelayManager] 调用API测试延迟，代理: ${name}, URL: ${url}&#96;);\n\n      // 设置超时处理, delay = 0 为超时\n      const timeoutPromise = new Promise\u003cProxyDelay\u003e((resolve) =\u003e {\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e resolve({ delay: 0 }), timeout);\n      });\n\n      // 使用Promise.race来实现超时控制\n      const result = await Promise.race([\n        delayProxyByName(name, url, timeout),\n        timeoutPromise,\n      ]);\n\n      const elapsedTime = Date.now() - startTime;\n\n      delay = result.delay;\n      elapsed = elapsedTime;\n      debugLog(&#96;[DelayManager] 延迟测试完成，代理: ${name}, 结果: ${delay}ms&#96;);\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(&#96;[DelayManager] 延迟测试出错，代理: ${name}&#96;, error);\n      delay = 1e6; // error\n      elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;\n    }\n\n    return this.setDelay(name, group, delay, { elapsed });\n  }\n\n  async checkListDelay(\n    nameList: string[],\n    group: string,\n    timeout: number,\n    concurrency = 36,\n  ) {\n    \n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func getProxyDelay(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tquery := r.URL.Query()\n\turl := query.Get(\"url\")\n\ttimeout, err := strconv.ParseInt(query.Get(\"timeout\"), 10, 16)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrBadRequest)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\texpectedStatus, err := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](query.Get(\"expected\"))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrBadRequest)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tproxy := r.Context().Value(CtxKeyProxy).(C.Proxy)\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(timeout))\n\tdefer cancel()\n\n\tdelay, err := proxy.URLTest(ctx, url, expectedStatus)\n\tif ctx.Err() != nil {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusGatewayTimeout)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrRequestTimeout)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif err != nil || delay == 0 {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusServiceUnavailable)\n\t\tif err != nil \u0026\u0026 delay != 0 {\n\t\t\trender.JSON(w, r, err)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\trender.JSON(w, r, newError(\"An error occurred in the delay test\"))\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\trender.JSON(w, r, render.M{\n\t\t\"delay\": delay,\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc unfixedProxy(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tproxy := r.Context().Value(CtxKeyProxy).(C.Proxy)\n\tif selectAble, ok := proxy.Adapter().(outboundgroup.SelectAble); ok \u0026\u0026 proxy.Type() != C.Selector {\n\t\tselectAble.ForceSet(\"\")\n\t\tcachefile.Cache().SetSelected(proxy.Name(), \"\")\n\t\trender.NoContent(w, r)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\trender.Status(r, http.StatusBadRequest)\n\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrBadRequest)\n}\n\n// proxiesWithProviders merges all proxies from tunnel\n//\n// Deprecated: This function is poorly implemented and should not be called by any new code.\n// It is left here only to ensure the compatibility of the output of the existing RESTful API.\nfunc proxiesWithProviders() map[string]C.Proxy {\n\tallProxies := make(map[string]C.Proxy)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const useCloseAllWithDelayCheck = \nconst handleCloseAllWithDelayCheck = async () =\u003e {\n\");\n\n      // 自动切换到每个组第一个连接成功的节点（只处理 URLTest 和 Fallback，不处理 Selector）\n      for (const group of groups) {\n        if (!group.all || group.all.length === 0) continue;\n        if (![\"URLTest\", \"Fallback\"].includes(group.type)) continue;\n\n        // 按照组中节点的原始顺序（group.all）查找第一个连接成功的节点\n        // 这样可以确保选择的是排序最靠前的成功节点\n        let firstSuccessProxy: string | null = null;\n        \n        for (const proxy of group.all) {\n          const proxyName = typeof proxy === \"string\" ? proxy : proxy.name;\n          if (!proxyName) continue;\n          \n          // 跳过 DIRECT、REJECT 和 provider 节点\n          if (proxyName === \"DIRECT\" || proxyName === \"REJECT\") continue;\n          const proxyRecord = proxiesData.records?.[proxyName];\n          if (proxyRecord?.provider) continue;\n          \n          // 检查该节点是否连接成功\n          const delayUpdate = delayManager.getDelayUpdate(proxyName, group.name);\n          if (delayUpdate) {\n            const delay = delayUpdate.delay;\n            const delayText = delayManager.formatDelay(delay, timeout);\n            \n            // 判断是否连接成功：不是T、E、-、testing，且delay \u003e 0\n            if (\n              delayText !== \"T\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"E\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"-\" \u0026\u0026\n              delayText !== \"testing\" \u0026\u0026\n              delay \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026\n              delay \u003c timeout \u0026\u0026\n              delay \u003c= 1e5\n            ) {\n              // 找到第一个连接成功的节点（按原始顺序）\n              firstSuccessProxy = proxyName;\n              debugLog(\n                &#96;[CloseAll] Found first success proxy for group ${group.name}: ${proxyName} (delay: ${delay}ms)&#96;,\n              );\n              break;\n            }\n          }\n        }\n\n        // 如果找到连接成功的节点，且当前节点不是它，则切换\n  };\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \nconst handleGroupChange = \n,\n  );\n\n  // 对指定节点做延迟检测；不传 override 时使用当前选中节点（供定时/自动检测用）\n  const checkCurrentProxyDelay = useCallback(\n    async (override?: {\n      groupName: string;\n      proxyName: string;\n      proxyRecord: any;\n    }) =\u003e {\n      if (autoCheckInProgressRef.current) return;\n      if (isDirectMode) return;\n\n      const groupName = override?.groupName ?? state.selection.group;\n      const proxyName = override?.proxyName ?? state.selection.proxy;\n      const proxyRecord = override?.proxyRecord ?? latestProxyRecordRef.current;\n\n      if (!groupName || !proxyName) return;\n\n      if (!proxyRecord) {\n        debugLog(\n          &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 延迟检测跳过，组: ${groupName}, 节点: ${proxyName} 未找到&#96;,\n        );\n        return;\n      }\n\n      autoCheckInProgressRef.current = true;\n\n      const groupRecord = state.proxyData.records?.[groupName];\n      const isSelected =\n        proxyName === state.selection.proxy \u0026\u0026\n        groupName === state.selection.group;\n      const timeout = getGroupDelayTimeout(groupRecord, isSelected);\n\n      try {\n        debugLog(\n          &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 检测节点延迟，组: ${groupName}, 节点: ${proxyName}&#96;,\n        );\n        if (proxyRecord.provider) {\n          await healthcheckProxyProvider(proxyRecord.provider);\n        } else {\n          await delayManager.checkDelay(proxyName, groupName, timeout);\n        }\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\n          &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 检测节点延迟失败，组: ${groupName}, 节点: ${proxyName}&#96;,\n          error,\n        );\n      } finally {\n        autoCheckInProgressRef.current = false;\n        refreshProxy();\n        if (sortType === 1) {\n          setDelaySortRefresh((prev) =\u003e prev + 1);\n        }\n      }\n    },\n    [\n      isDirectMode,\n      refreshProxy,\n      state.proxyData.records,\n      state.selection.group,\n      state.selection.proxy,\n      sortType,\n      setDelaySortRefresh,\n    ],\n  );\n\n  // 处理代理节点变更\n  const handleProxyChange = useCallback\n;\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (s *Selector) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\n\tall := []string{}\n\tfor _, proxy := range s.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tall = append(all, proxy.Name())\n\t}\n\t// When testurl is the default value\n\t// do not append a value to ensure that the web dashboard follows the settings of the dashboard\n\tvar url string\n\tif s.testUrl != C.DefaultTestURL {\n\t\turl = s.testUrl\n\t}\n\n\treturn json.Marshal(map[string]any{\n\t\t\"type\":            s.Type().String(),\n\t\t\"now\":             s.Now(),\n\t\t\"all\":             all,\n\t\t\"testUrl\":         url,\n\t\t\"timeout\":         s.TestTimeout,\n\t\t\"selectedTimeout\": s.selectedTimeout,\n\t\t\"hidden\":          s.Hidden,\n\t\t\"icon\":            s.Icon,\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc (s *Selector) Now()         "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \nconst handleCheckDelay = async () =\u003e {\n\n\n    // 测试非提供者的节点\n    if (proxyNames.length \u003e 0) {\n      const url = delayManager.getUrl(groupName);\n      debugLog(&#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 测试URL: ${url}, 超时: ${timeout}ms&#96;);\n\n      try {\n        await Promise.race([\n          delayManager.checkListDelay(proxyNames, groupName, timeout),\n          delayGroup(groupName, url, timeout),\n        ]);\n        debugLog(&#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 延迟测试完成，组: ${groupName}&#96;);\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\n          &#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 延迟测试出错，组: ${groupName}&#96;,\n          error,\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    refreshProxy();\n    if (sortType === 1) {\n      setDelaySortRefresh((prev) =\u003e prev + 1);\n    }\n  });\n\n  // 计算要显示的代理选项（增加非空校验）\n  const proxyOptions = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    const sortWithLatency = (proxiesToSort: ProxyOption[]) =\u003e {\n      if (!proxiesToSort || sortType === 0) return proxiesToSort;\n;\n  }\n;\n;",

        "contents": "export const useCloseAllWithDelayCheck = \nconst handleCloseAllWithDelayCheck = async () =\u003e {\n\n      \n      for (let groupIndex = 0; groupIndex \u003c groups.length; groupIndex++) {\n        const group = groups[groupIndex];\n        if (!group.all || group.all.length === 0) continue;\n\n        const groupProxyNames = group.all\n          .map((proxy: IProxyItem | string) =\u003e typeof proxy === \"string\" ? proxy : proxy.name)\n          .filter((proxyName: string | undefined): proxyName is string =\u003e {\n            if (!proxyName) return false;\n            const proxy = proxiesData.records?.[proxyName];\n            return (\n              !proxy?.provider \u0026\u0026\n              proxyName !== \"DIRECT\" \u0026\u0026\n              proxyName !== \"REJECT\"\n            );\n          });\n\n        if (groupProxyNames.length === 0) continue;\n\n        // 记录第一个组\n        if (firstGroupName === null) {\n          firstGroupName = group.name;\n        }\n\n        const url = delayManager.getUrl(group.name);\n        const timeout = group?.timeout ?? DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS;\n        debugLog(\n          &#96;[CloseAll] Checking delays for group ${group.name}, ${groupProxyNames.length} proxies&#96;,\n        );\n\n        try {\n          // 如果不是第一个组，尝试复用第一个组的测试结果\n      }\n  };\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import {\n  AccessTimeRounded,\n  ChevronRight,\n  NetworkCheckRounded,\n  WifiOff as SignalError,\n  SignalWifi3Bar as SignalGood,\n  SignalWifi2Bar as SignalMedium,\n  SignalWifi0Bar as SignalNone,\n  SignalWifi4Bar as SignalStrong,\n  SignalWifi1Bar as SignalWeak,\n  SortByAlphaRounded,\n  SortRounded,\n} from \"@mui/icons-material\";\nimport {\n  Box,\n  Button,\n  Chip,\n  FormControl,\n  IconButton,\n  InputLabel,\n  MenuItem,\n  Select,\n  SelectChangeEvent,\n  Tooltip,\n  Typography,\n  alpha,\n  useTheme,\n} from \"@mui/material\";\nimport { useLockFn } from \"ahooks\";\nimport React, {\n  useCallback,\n  useEffect,\n  useMemo,\n  useRef,\n  useState,\n} from \"react\";\nimport { useTranslation } from \"react-i18next\";\nimport { useNavigate } from \"react-router\";\nimport { delayGroup, healthcheckProxyProvider } from \"tauri-plugin-mihomo-api\";\n\nimport { EnhancedCard } from \"@/components/home/enhanced-card\";\nimport { useProfiles } from \"@/hooks/use-profiles\";\nimport { useProxySelection } from \"@/hooks/use-proxy-selection\";\nimport { useVerge } from \"@/hooks/use-verge\";\nimport { useAppData } from \"@/providers/app-data-context\";\nimport delayManager, {\n  getGroupDelayTimeout,\n  DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS,\n} from \"@/services/delay\";\nimport { debugLog } from \"@/utils/debug\";\n\n// 本地存储的键名\nconst STORAGE_KEY_GROUP = \"clash-verge-selected-proxy-group\";\nconst STORAGE_KEY_PROXY = \"clash-verge-selected-proxy\";\nconst STORAGE_KEY_SORT_TYPE = \"clash-verge-proxy-sort-type\";\n\nconst AUTO_CHECK_DEFAULT_INTERVAL_MINUTES = 5;\nconst AUTO_CHECK_INITIAL_DELAY_MS = 100;\n\n// 代理节点信息接口\ninterface ProxyOption {\n  name: string;\n}\n\n// 排序类型: 默认 | 按延迟 | 按字母\ntype ProxySortType = 0 | 1 | 2;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": " {\n    use crate::utils::network::{NetworkManager, ProxyType};\n    use tokio::time::Instant;\n\n    let tun_mode = Config::verge().await.latest_arc().enable_tun_mode.unwrap_or(false);\n\n    // 如果是TUN模式，不使用代理，否则使用自身代理\n    let proxy_type = if !tun_mode {\n        ProxyType::Localhost\n    } else {\n        ProxyType::None\n    };\n\n    let user_agent = Some(\"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/120.0.0.0\".into());\n\n    let start = Instant::now();\n\n    let response = NetworkManager::new()\n        .get_with_interrupt(\u0026url, proxy_type, Some(10), user_agent, false)\n        .await;\n\n    match response {\n        Ok(response) =\u003e {\n            logging!(trace, Type::Network, \"test_delay response: {response:#?}\");\n            if response.status().is_success() {\n                Ok(start.elapsed().as_millis() as u32)\n            } else {\n                Ok(10000u32)\n            }\n        }\n        Err(err) =\u003e {\n            logging!(trace, Type::Network, \"test_delay error: {err:#?}\");\n            Err(err)\n        }\n    }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \nconst proxyOptions = (() =\u003e {\n    const sortWithLatency = (proxiesToSort: ProxyOption[]) =\u003e {\n      if (!proxiesToSort || sortType === 0) return proxiesToSort;\n\n      if (!state.proxyData.records || !state.selection.group) {\n        return proxiesToSort;\n      }\n\n      const list = [...proxiesToSort];\n\n      if (sortType === 1) {\n        const refreshTick = delaySortRefresh;\n        const groupRecord = state.proxyData.records?.[state.selection.group];\n        const effectiveTimeout =\n          getGroupDelayTimeout(groupRecord, false) || DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n        const categorizeDelay = (delay: number): [number, number] =\u003e {\n          if (!Number.isFinite(delay)) return [5, Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER];\n          if (delay \u003e 1e5) return [4, delay];\n          if (delay === 0 || (delay \u003e= effectiveTimeout \u0026\u0026 delay \u003c= 1e5)) {\n            return [3, delay || effectiveTimeout];\n          }\n          if (delay \u003c 0) return [5, Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER];\n          return [0, delay];\n        };\n\n        list.sort((a, b) =\u003e {\n          const recordA = state.proxyData.records[a.name];\n          const recordB = state.proxyData.records[b.name];\n\n          const [ar, av] = recordA\n            ? categorizeDelay(\n                delayManager.getDelayFix(recordA, state.selection.group),\n              )\n            : [6, Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER];\n          const [br, bv] = recordB\n            ? categorizeDelay(\n                delayManager.getDelayFix(recordB, state.selection.group),\n              )\n            : [6, Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER];\n\n          if (ar !== br) return ar - br;\n          if (av !== bv) return av - bv;\n          return refreshTick \u003e= 0 ? a.name.localeCompare(b.name) : 0;\n        });\n      } else {\n        list.sort((a, b) =\u003e a.name.localeCompare(b.name));\n      }\n\n      return list;\n    };\n\n    if (isDirectMode) {\n      return [{ name: \"DIRECT\" }];\n    }\n    if (isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 proxies?.global) {\n      const options = proxies.global.all\n        .filter\n\n;\n  }\n;\n;",
