      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const useCloseAllWithDelayCheck = \nconst handleCloseAllWithDelayCheck = async () =\u003e {\nfor (let groupIndex = 0; groupIndex \u003c groups.length; groupIndex++) {\n\n\n        try {\n          // 如果不是第一个组，尝试复用第一个组的测试结果\n          if (groupIndex \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 firstGroupName) {\n            let reusedCount = 0;\n            const proxiesToTest: string[] = [];\n\n            for (const proxyName of groupProxyNames) {\n              // 检查第一个组是否有该节点的测试结果\n              const firstGroupResult = delayManager.getDelayUpdate(proxyName, firstGroupName);\n              \n              if (firstGroupResult \u0026\u0026 firstGroupResult.delay !== -1 \u0026\u0026 firstGroupResult.delay !== -2) {\n                // 复用第一个组的结果，直接设置到当前组\n                delayManager.setDelay(\n                  proxyName,\n                  group.name,\n                  firstGroupResult.delay,\n                  { elapsed: firstGroupResult.elapsed }\n                );\n                reusedCount++;\n                debugLog(\n                  &#96;[CloseAll] Reused delay result for ${proxyName}: ${firstGroupResult.delay}ms (from group ${firstGroupName})&#96;,\n                );\n              } else {\n                // 第一个组没有结果，需要测试\n                proxiesToTest.push(proxyName);\n              }\n            }\n\n            debugLog(\n              &#96;[CloseAll] Group ${group.name}: reused ${reusedCount}/${groupProxyNames.length} results from first group&#96;,\n            );\n\n            // 只测试第一个组没有结果的节点\n            if (proxiesToTest.length \u003e 0) {\n              debugLog(\n                &#96;[CloseAll] Testing ${proxiesToTest.length} proxies that were not in first group&#96;,\n              );\n              await delayManager.checkListDelay(proxiesToTest, group.name, timeout);\n            } else {\n              debugLog(&#96;[CloseAll] All proxies reused from first group, skipping test&#96;);\n            }\n          } else {\n            // 第一个组，正常测试所有节点\n            debugLog\n      }\n  };\n;",

        "contents": "\treturn proxies[0]\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) Set(name string) error {\n\tvar p C.Proxy\n\tfor _, proxy := range f.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tif proxy.Name() == name {\n\t\t\tp = proxy\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"proxy not exist\")\n\t}\n\n\tf.selected = name\n\t// 固定测速：选中节点时始终执行一次 URLTest，更新延迟与存活状态\n\ttimeoutMs := f.selectedTimeout\n\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {\n\t\ttimeoutMs = f.TestTimeout\n\t}\n\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {\n\t\ttimeoutMs = 5000\n\t}\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(timeoutMs))\n\tdefer cancel()\n\texpectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](f.expectedStatus)\n\t_, _ = p.URLTest(ctx, f.testUrl, expectedStatus)\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) ForceSet(name string) {\n\tf.selected = name\n}\n\n// ClearManualSelection clears the fixed selected node so the group auto-picks first alive.\nfunc (f *Fallback) ClearManualSelection() {\n\tf.selected = \"\"\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) Providers() []P.ProxyProvider {\n\treturn f.providers\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) Proxies() []C.Proxy {\n\treturn f.GetProxies(false)\n}\n\nfunc NewFallback(option *GroupCommonOption, providers []P.ProxyProvider) *Fallback {\n\treturn \u0026Fallback{\n\t\tGroupBase: NewGroupBase(GroupBaseOption{\n\t\t\tName:                 option.Name,\n\t\t\tType:                 C.Fallback,\n\t\t\tFilter:               option.Filter,\n\t\t\tExcludeFilter:        option.ExcludeFilter,\n\t\t\tExcludeType:          option.ExcludeType,\n\t\t\tTestTimeout:          option.TestTimeout,\n\t\t\tFailureResetInterval: option.FailureResetInterval,\n\t\t\tMaxFailedTimes:       option.MaxFailedTimes,\n\t\t\tProviders: option.SelectedTimeout,\n\t\tHidden:          option.Hidden,\n\t\tIcon:            option.Icon,\n\t}\n}",

        "contents": "package tunnel\n\nimport (\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/dlclark/regexp2\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/adapter/outboundgroup\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/tunnel\"\n)\n\ntype SortMode int\n\nconst (\n\tDefault SortMode = iota\n\tTitle\n\tDelay\n)\n\ntype Proxy struct {\n\tName     string &#96;json:\"name\"&#96;\n\tTitle    string &#96;json:\"title\"&#96;\n\tSubtitle string &#96;json:\"subtitle\"&#96;\n\tType     string &#96;json:\"type\"&#96;\n\tDelay    int    &#96;json:\"delay\"&#96;\n}\n\ntype ProxyGroup struct {\n\tType    string   &#96;json:\"type\"&#96;\n\tNow     string   &#96;json:\"now\"&#96;\n\tProxies []*Proxy &#96;json:\"proxies\"&#96;\n}\n\ntype sortableProxyList struct {\n\tlist []*Proxy\n\tless func(a, b *Proxy) bool\n}\n\nfunc (s *sortableProxyList) Len() int {\n\treturn len(s.list)\n}\n\nfunc (s *sortableProxyList) Less(i, j int) bool {\n\treturn s.less(s.list[i], s.list[j])\n}\n\nfunc (s *sortableProxyList) Swap(i, j int) {\n\ts.list[i], s.list[j] = s.list[j], s.list[i]\n}\n\nfunc QueryProxyGroupNames(excludeNotSelectable bool) []string {\n\tmode := tunnel.Mode()\n\n\tif mode == tunnel.Direct {\n\t\treturn []string{}\n\t}\n\n\tglobal := tunnel.Proxies()[\"GLOBAL\"].Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tproxies := global.Providers()[0].Proxies()\n\tresult := make([]string, 0, len(proxies)+1)\n\n\tif mode == tunnel.Global {\n\t\tresult = append(result, \"GLOBAL\")\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, p := range proxies {\n\t\tif _, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup); ok {\n\t\t\tif !excludeNotSelectable || p.Type() == C.Selector || p.Type() == C.Fallback || p.Type() == C.URLTest {\n\t\t\t\tresult = append(result, p.Name())\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn result\n}\n\nfunc QueryProxyGroup(name string, sortMode SortMode,",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class DelayManager {\n\n\n  async checkListDelay(\n    nameList: string[],\n    group: string,\n    timeout: number,\n    concurrency = 36,\n  ) {\n    debugLog(\n      &#96;[DelayManager] 批量测试延迟开始，组: ${group}, 数量: ${nameList.length}, 并发数: ${concurrency}&#96;,\n    );\n    const names = nameList.filter(Boolean);\n    // 设置正在延迟测试中\n    names.forEach((name) =\u003e this.setDelay(name, group, -2));\n\n    let index = 0;\n    const startTime = Date.now();\n    const listener = this.groupListenerMap.get(group);\n\n    const help = async (): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e =\u003e {\n      const currName = names[index++];\n      if (!currName) return;\n\n      try {\n        // 确保API调用前状态为测试中\n        this.setDelay(currName, group, -2);\n\n        // 添加一些随机延迟，避免所有请求同时发出和返回\n        if (index \u003e 1) {\n          // 第一个不延迟，保持响应性\n          await new Promise((resolve) =\u003e\n            setTimeout(resolve, Math.random() * 200),\n          );\n        }\n\n        await this.checkDelay(currName, group, timeout);\n        if (listener) {\n          this.queueGroupNotification(group);\n        }\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\n          &#96;[DelayManager] 批量测试单个代理出错，代理: ${currName}&#96;,\n          error,\n        );\n        // 设置为错误状态\n        this.setDelay(currName, group, 1e6);\n      }\n\n      return help();\n    };\n\n    // 限制并发数，避免发送太多请求\n    const actualConcurrency = Math.min(concurrency, names.length, 30);\n    debugLog(&#96;[DelayManager] 实际并发数: ${actualConcurrency}&#96;);\n\n    const promiseList: Promise\u003cvoid\u003e[] = [];\n    for (let i = 0; i \u003c actualConcurrency; i++) {\n      promiseList.push(help());\n    }\n\n    await Promise.all(promiseList);\n    const totalTime = Date.now() - startTime;\n    debugLog(\n      &#96;[DelayManager] 批量测试延迟完成，组: ${group}, 总耗时: ${totalTime}ms&#96;,\n    );\n  }\n\n  formatDelay(delay: number, timeout = DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS) {\n    if (delay === -1) return \"-\";\n  }",

        "contents": "export const ProxyGroups = \n\n\n  // 测全部延迟（使用配置里的 timeout）\n  const handleCheckAll = useLockFn(async (groupName: string) =\u003e {\n    debugLog(&#96;[ProxyGroups] 开始测试所有延迟，组: ${groupName}&#96;);\n\n    const group = availableGroups.find(\n      (g: IProxyGroupItem) =\u003e g.name === groupName,\n    );\n    const timeout = group?.timeout ?? 5000;\n\n    const proxies = renderList\n      .filter(\n        (e) =\u003e e.group?.name === groupName \u0026\u0026 (e.type === 2 || e.type === 4),\n      )\n      .flatMap((e) =\u003e e.proxyCol || e.proxy!)\n      .filter(Boolean);\n\n    debugLog(&#96;[ProxyGroups] 找到代理数量: ${proxies.length}&#96;);\n\n    const providers = new Set(proxies.map((p) =\u003e p!.provider!).filter(Boolean));\n\n    if (providers.size) {\n      debugLog(&#96;[ProxyGroups] 发现提供者，数量: ${providers.size}&#96;);\n      Promise.allSettled(\n        [...providers].map((p) =\u003e healthcheckProxyProvider(p)),\n      ).then(() =\u003e {\n        debugLog(&#96;[ProxyGroups] 提供者健康检查完成&#96;);\n        onProxies();\n      });\n    }\n\n    const names = proxies.filter((p) =\u003e !p!.provider).map((p) =\u003e p!.name);\n    debugLog(&#96;[ProxyGroups] 过滤后需要测试的代理数量: ${names.length}&#96;);\n\n    const url = delayManager.getUrl(groupName);\n    debugLog(&#96;[ProxyGroups] 测试URL: ${url}, 超时: ${timeout}ms&#96;);\n\n    try {\n      await Promise.race([\n        delayManager.checkListDelay\n\n  };\n;",

    {

        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \nconst checkCurrentProxyDelay = \n\n  );\n\n  // 处理代理节点变更\n  const handleProxyChange = useCallback(\n    (event: SelectChangeEvent\u003cstring\u003e) =\u003e {\n      if (isDirectMode) return;\n\n      const newProxy = event.target.value;\n      const currentGroup = state.selection.group;\n      const previousProxy = state.selection.proxy;\n\n      debouncedSetState((prev: ProxyState) =\u003e ({\n        ...prev,\n        selection: {\n          ...prev.selection,\n          proxy: newProxy,\n        },\n        displayProxy: prev.proxyData.records[newProxy] || null,\n      }));\n\n      if (!isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 !isDirectMode) {\n        writeProfileScopedItem(STORAGE_KEY_PROXY, newProxy);\n      }\n\n      const skipConfigSave = isGlobalMode || isDirectMode;\n      handleSelectChange(currentGroup, previousProxy, skipConfigSave)(event);\n\n      // 手动切换节点后立即检测新节点延迟，以显示最新速度\n      const newProxyRecord = state.proxyData.records?.[newProxy] ?? _**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

The core's getProxyDelay API takes timeout from the **query parameter** - the frontend passes it. So the core doesn't need to "return" timeout in getProxies - the frontend just needs to **know** what timeout to pass when calling the delay API. The question is: where does the frontend get timeout/selected-timeout from **without** the core returning it in getProxies?

Android: I will search the Android app (design/, or other Android-related paths) for how they get group config - they might read from the **profile YAML** (proxy-groups in the config file) instead of from the core's runtime API. So the flow would be: 1) Load the active profile config (which has proxy-groups with timeout, selected-timeout), 2) When doing delay test, look up the group in that config and use its timeout. So desktop could do the same: get the current profile's config (proxy-groups) and read timeout/selected-timeout from there, instead of expecting getProxies() to return them.

I will search for how Android gets profile config or proxy-groups.
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

So Android's ProxyGroup only has type, proxies, now - no timeout or selectedTimeout. Android gets ProxyGroup from Bridge.nativeQueryGroup which is the core (Go). So the Android core returns the group JSON from native - and that JSON is produced by the Go core's MarshalJSON. So if the Android app has "already implemented" using config timeout, they might be:
1) Reading timeout/selected-timeout from the **profile config file** (YAML) when doing delay test - not from the core API. So the Android app would load the current profile's proxy-groups config and look up timeout for each group.
2) Or the Android core (Go) might already be a fork that returns timeout in the JSON - I will check the Android core's group MarshalJSON.

Actually the user said "安卓已经实现了这样的功能" - Android has already implemented this. So on Android they don't use a global "default latency timeout" setting - they use config. The question is: does Android get timeout from (A) the core's API response (getProxies / queryGroup), or (B) from the profile config (YAML proxy-groups)?

If (A), then the Android core would need to return timeout in the JSON - so the Android core might have been modified to add timeout to MarshalJSON. But we're in the same repo - the core is shared (core/src/foss/golang for desktop, core/src/main/golang for Android?). I will check - there's core/src/foss/golang and core/src/main/golang. So there might be two cores - one for Android (main) and one for desktop (foss). So the Android app might use core from main/golang which could have different MarshalJSON. I will check - does the main Go core (Android) have timeout in MarshalJSON?
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

I see! The Android core (core/src/main/golang/native/tunnel/proxies.go) has its **own** ProxyGroup struct and QueryProxyGroup - it does **not** use the adapter's MarshalJSON. It builds a custom struct:

```go
type ProxyGroup struct {
	Type    string   `json:"type"`
	Now     string   `json:"now"`
	Proxies []*Proxy  `json:"proxies"`
}
```

So the Android core returns Type, Now, Proxies - no timeout or selectedTimeout. The delay shown in Android is from `p.LastDelayForTestUrl(testURL)` - i.e. the **cached** delay from the proxy's history, not from a new delay test triggered by the UI with a specific timeout.

So on Android:
1) They don't do delay test from the app with a custom timeout - they might use the core's built-in health check / URL test which uses config timeout.
2) Or they read config (profile) for timeout when they need to show or run something.

I will search for where Android does delay test or where it gets timeout from config.
</details></think>

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    override suspend fun run() {\n        val broadcasts = receiveBroadcast {\n            addAction(Intents.ACTION_PROFILE_CHANGED)\n            addAction(Intents.ACTION_OVERRIDE_CHANGED)\n        }\n\n        var loaded: UUID? = null\n\n        reload.trySend(Unit)\n\n        while (true) {\n            val changed: UUID? = select {\n                broadcasts.onReceive {\n                    if (it.action == Intents.ACTION_PROFILE_CHANGED)\n                        UUID.fromString(it.getStringExtra(Intents.EXTRA_UUID))\n                    else\n                        null\n                }\n                reload.onReceive {\n                    null\n                }\n            }\n\n            try {\n                val current = store.activeProfile\n                    ?: throw NullPointerException(\"No profile selected\")\n\n                if (current == loaded \u0026\u0026 changed != null \u0026\u0026 changed != loaded)\n                    continue\n\n                loaded = current\n\n                val active = ImportedDao().queryByUUID(current)\n                    ?: throw NullPointerException(\"No profile selected\")\n\n                Clash.load(service.importedDir.resolve(active.uuid.toString())).await()\n\n                val remove = SelectionDao().querySelections(active.uuid)\n                    .filterNot { Clash.patchSelector(it.proxy, it.selected) }\n                    .map { it.proxy }\n\n                SelectionDao().removeSelections(active.uuid, remove)\n\n                StatusProvider.currentProfile = active.name\n\n                service.sendProfileLoaded(current)\n\n                Log.d(\"Profile ${active.name} loaded\")\n            } catch (e: Exception) {\n                return enqueueEvent(LoadException(e.message ?: \"Unknown\"))\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.service.store\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.store.Store\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.store.asStoreProvider\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.PreferenceProvider\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.model.AccessControlMode\nimport java.util.*\n\nclass ServiceStore(context: Context) {\n    private val store = Store(\n        PreferenceProvider\n            .createSharedPreferencesFromContext(context)\n            .asStoreProvider()\n    )\n\n    var activeProfile: UUID? by store.typedString(\n        key = \"active_profile\",\n        from = { if (it.isBlank()) null else UUID.fromString(it) },\n        to = { it?.toString() ?: \"\" }\n    )\n\n    var bypassPrivateNetwork: Boolean by store.boolean(\n        key = \"bypass_private_network\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n\n    var accessControlMode: AccessControlMode by store.enum(\n        key = \"access_control_mode\",\n        defaultValue = AccessControlMode.AcceptAll,\n        values = AccessControlMode.values()\n    )\n\n    var accessControlPackages by store.stringSet(\n        key = \"access_control_packages\",\n        defaultValue = emptySet()\n    )\n\n    var dnsHijacking by store.boolean(\n        key = \"dns_hijacking\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n\n    var systemProxy by store.boolean(\n        key = \"system_proxy\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n\n    var allowBypass by store.boolean(\n        key = \"allow_bypass\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n\n    var allowIpv6 by store.boolean(\n        key = \"allow_ipv6\",\n        defaultValue = false\n    )\n\n    var tunStackMode by store.string(\n        key = \"tun_stack_mode\",\n        defaultValue = \"system\"\n    )\n\n    var dynamicNotification by store.boolean(\n        key = \"dynamic_notification\",\n        defaultValue = true\n    )\n}",

        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.core.model\n\nimport android.os.Parcel\nimport android.os.Parcelable\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.util.Parcelizer\nimport kotlinx.serialization.SerialName\nimport kotlinx.serialization.Serializable\n\n@Serializable\ndata class ConfigurationOverride(\n    @SerialName(\"port\")\n    var httpPort: Int? = null,\n\n    @SerialName(\"mixed-port\")\n    var mixedPort: Int? = null,\n\n    @SerialName(\"authentication\")\n    var authentication: List\u003cString\u003e? = null,\n\n    @SerialName(\"allow-lan\")\n    var allowLan: Boolean?       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package route\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/adapter/outboundgroup\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/profile/cachefile\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/tunnel\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/chi\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/chi/render\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/http\"\n)\n\nfunc groupRouter() http.Handler {\n\tr := chi.NewRouter()\n\tr.Get(\"/\", getGroups)\n\n\tr.Route(\"/{name}\", func(r chi.Router) {\n\t\tr.Use(parseProxyName, findProxyByName)\n\t\tr.Get(\"/\", getGroup)\n\t\tr.Get(\"/delay\", getGroupDelay)\n\t})\n\treturn r\n}\n\nfunc getGroups(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar gs []C.Proxy\n\tfor _, p := range tunnel.Proxies() {\n\t\tif _, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup); ok {\n\t\t\tgs = append(gs, p)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\trender.JSON(w, r, render.M{\n\t\t\"proxies\": gs,\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc getGroup(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tproxy := r.Context().Value(CtxKeyProxy).(C.Proxy)\n\tif _, ok := proxy.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup); ok {\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, proxy)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\trender.Status(r, http.StatusNotFound)\n\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc getGroupDelay",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package route\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/adapter/outboundgroup\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/profile/cachefile\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/tunnel\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/chi\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/chi/render\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/http\"\n)\n\nfunc groupRouter() http.Handler {\n\tr := chi.NewRouter()\n\tr.Get(\"/\", getGroups)\n\n\tr.Route(\"/{name}\", func(r chi.Router) {\n\t\tr.Use(parseProxyName, findProxyByName)\n\t\tr.Get(\"/\", getGroup)\n\t\tr.Get(\"/delay\", getGroupDelay)\n\t})\n\treturn r\n}\n\nfunc getGroups(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar gs []C.Proxy\n\tfor _, p := range tunnel.Proxies() {\n\t\tif _, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup); ok {\n\t\t\tgs = append(gs, p)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\trender.JSON(w, r, render.M{\n\t\t\"proxies\": gs,\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc getGroup(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tproxy := r.Context().Value(CtxKeyProxy).(C.Proxy)\n\tif _, ok := proxy.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup); ok {\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, proxy)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\trender.Status(r, http.StatusNotFound)\n\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc getGroupDelay",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package config\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/dlclark/regexp2\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/common\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/config\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n)\n\nvar processors = []processor{\n\tpatchExternalController, // must before patchOverride, so we only apply ExternalController in Override settings\n\tpatchOverride,\n\tpatchGeneral,\n\tpatchProfile,\n\tpatchDns,\n\tpatchTun,\n\tpatchListeners,\n\tpatchProviders,\n\tvalidConfig,\n}\n\ntype processor func(cfg *config.RawConfig, profileDir string) error\n\nfunc patchOverride(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error {\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(strings.NewReader(ReadOverride(OverrideSlotPersist))).Decode(cfg); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Apply persist override: %s\", err.Error())\n\t}\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(strings.NewReader(ReadOverride(OverrideSlotSession))).Decode(cfg); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Apply session override: %s\", err.Error())\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc patchExternalController(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error {\n\tcfg.ExternalController = \"\"\n\tcfg.ExternalControllerTLS = \"\"\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc patchGeneral(cfg *config.RawConfig, profileDir string) error {\n\tcfg.Interface = \"\"\n\tcfg.RoutingMark = 0\n\tif cfg.ExternalController != \"\" || cfg.ExternalControllerTLS != \"\" {\n\t\tcfg.ExternalUI = profileDir + \"/ui\"\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc patchProfile(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error {\n\tcfg.Profile.StoreSelected = false\n\tcfg.Profile.StoreFakeIP = true\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc patchDns(cfg *config.RawConfig, _ string) error",

        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.core.model\n\nimport android.os.Parcel\nimport android.os.Parcelable\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.util.Parcelizer\nimport kotlinx.serialization.Serializable\n\n@Serializable\ndata class Proxy(\n    val name: String,\n    val title: String,\n    val subtitle: String,\n    val type: Type,\n    val delay: Int,\n) : Parcelable {\n    @Suppress(\"unused\")\n    enum class Type(val group: Boolean) {\n        Direct(false),\n        Reject(false),\n        RejectDrop(false),\n        Compatible(false),\n        Pass(false),\n\n        Shadowsocks(false),\n        ShadowsocksR(false),\n        Snell(false),\n        Socks5(false),\n        Http(false),\n        Vmess(false),\n        Vless(false),\n        Trojan(false),\n        Hysteria(false),\n        Hysteria2(false),\n        Tuic(false),\n        WireGuard(false),\n        Dns(false),\n        Ssh(false),\n        Mieru(false),\n        AnyTLS(false),\n        Sudoku(false),\n\n\n        Relay(true),\n        Selector(true),\n        Fallback(true),\n        URLTest(true),\n        LoadBalance(true),\n\n        Unknown(false);\n    }\n\n    override fun writeToParcel(parcel: Parcel, flags: Int) {\n        Parcelizer.encodeToParcel(serializer(), parcel, this)\n    }\n\n    override fun describeContents(): Int {\n        return 0\n    }\n\n    companion object CREATOR : Parcelable.Creator\u003cProxy\u003e {\n        override fun createFromParcel(parcel: Parcel): Proxy {\n            return Parcelizer.decodeFromParcel(serializer(), parcel)\n        }\n\n        override fun newArray(size: Int): Array\u003cProxy?\u003e {\n            return arrayOfNulls(size)\n        }\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.service\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.log.Log\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.Clash\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.model.*\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.data.Selection\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.data.SelectionDao\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.remote.IClashManager\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.remote.ILogObserver\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.store.ServiceStore\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.util.sendOverrideChanged\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.*\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.channels.ReceiveChannel\n\nclass ClashManager(private val context: Context) : IClashManager,\n    CoroutineScope by CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO) {\n    private val store = ServiceStore(context)\n    private var logReceiver: ReceiveChannel\u003cLogMessage\u003e? = null\n\n    override fun queryTunnelState(): TunnelState {\n        return Clash.queryTunnelState()\n    }\n\n    override fun queryTrafficTotal(): Long {\n        return Clash.queryTrafficTotal()\n    }\n\n    override fun queryProxyGroupNames(excludeNotSelectable: Boolean): List\u003cString\u003e {\n        return Clash.queryGroupNames(excludeNotSelectable)\n    }\n\n    override fun queryProxyGroup(name: String, proxySort: ProxySort): ProxyGroup {\n        return Clash.queryGroup(name, proxySort)\n    }\n\n    override fun queryConfiguration(): UiConfiguration {\n        return Clash.queryConfiguration()\n    }\n\n    override fun queryProviders(): ProviderList {\n        return ProviderList(Clash.queryProviders())\n    }\n\n    override fun queryOverride(slot: Clash.OverrideSlot): ConfigurationOverride {\n        return Clash.queryOverride(slot)\n    }\n\n    override fun patchSelector(group: String, name: String): Boolean {\n        return Clash.patchSelector(group, name).also {\n            ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc getGroupDelay(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tproxy := r.Context().Value(CtxKeyProxy).(C.Proxy)\n\tgroup, ok := proxy.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusNotFound)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrNotFound)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif selectAble, ok := proxy.Adapter().(outboundgroup.SelectAble); ok \u0026\u0026 proxy.Type() != C.Selector {\n\t\tselectAble.ForceSet(\"\")\n\t\tcachefile.Cache().SetSelected(proxy.Name(), \"\")\n\t}\n\n\tquery := r.URL.Query()\n\turl := query.Get(\"url\")\n\ttimeout, err := strconv.ParseInt(query.Get(\"timeout\"), 10, 32)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrBadRequest)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\texpectedStatus, err := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](query.Get(\"expected\"))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, ErrBadRequest)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(r.Context(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(timeout))\n\tdefer cancel()\n\n\tdm, err := group.URLTest(ctx, url, expectedStatus)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusGatewayTimeout)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, newError(err.Error()))\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\trender.JSON(w, r, dm)\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func Parse() (*config.Config, error) {\n\treturn ParseWithPath(C.Path.Config())\n}\n\n// ParseWithPath parse config with custom config path\nfunc ParseWithPath(path string) (*config.Config, error) {\n\tbuf, err := readConfig(path)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn ParseWithBytes(buf)\n}\n\n// ParseWithBytes config with buffer\nfunc ParseWithBytes(buf []byte) (*config.Config, error) {\n\treturn config.Parse(buf)\n}\n\n// ApplyConfig dispatch configure to all parts without ExternalController\nfunc ApplyConfig(cfg *config.Config, force bool) {\n\tmux.Lock()\n\tdefer mux.Unlock()\n\tlog.SetLevel(cfg.General.LogLevel)\n\n\ttunnel.OnSuspend()\n\n\tca.ResetCertificate()\n\tfor _, c := range cfg.TLS.CustomTrustCert {\n\t\tif err := ca.AddCertificate(c); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Warnln(\"%s\\nadd error: %s\", c, err.Error())\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tupdateExperimental(cfg.Experimental)\n\tupdateUsers(cfg.Users)\n\tupdateProxies(cfg.Proxies, cfg.Providers)\n\tupdateRules(cfg.Rules, cfg.SubRules, cfg.RuleProviders)\n\tupdateSniffer(cfg.Sniffer)\n\tupdateHosts(cfg.Hosts)\n\tupdateGeneral(cfg.General, true)\n\tupdateNTP(cfg.NTP)\n\tupdateDNS(cfg.DNS, cfg.General.IPv6)\n\tupdateListeners(cfg.General, cfg.Listeners, force)\n\tupdateTun(cfg.General) // tun should not care \"force\"\n\tupdateIPTables(cfg)\n\tupdateTunnels(cfg.Tunnels)\n\n\ttunnel.OnInnerLoading()\n\n\tinitInnerTcp()\n\tloadProvider(cfg.Providers)\n\tupdateProfile(cfg)\n\tloadProvider(cfg.RuleProviders)\n\truntime.GC()\n\ttunnel.OnRunning()\n\tupdateUpdater(cfg)\n\n\tresolver.ResetConnection()\n}\n\nfunc initInnerTcp() {\n\tinner.New(tunnel.Tunnel)\n}\n\nfunc GetGeneral() *config.General {\n\tports := listener.GetPorts()",
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "func Parse() (*config.Config, error) {\n\treturn ParseWithPath(C.Path.Config())\n}\n\n// ParseWithPath parse config with custom config path\nfunc ParseWithPath(path string) (*config.Config, error) {\n\tbuf, err := readConfig(path)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn ParseWithBytes(buf)\n}\n\n// ParseWithBytes config with buffer\nfunc ParseWithBytes(buf []byte) (*config.Config, error) {\n\treturn config.Parse(buf)\n}\n\n// ApplyConfig dispatch configure to all parts without ExternalController\nfunc ApplyConfig(cfg *config.Config, force bool) {\n\tmux.Lock()\n\tdefer mux.Unlock()\n\tlog.SetLevel(cfg.General.LogLevel)\n\n\ttunnel.OnSuspend()\n\n\tca.ResetCertificate()\n\tfor _, c := range cfg.TLS.CustomTrustCert {\n\t\tif err := ca.AddCertificate(c); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Warnln(\"%s\\nadd error: %s\", c, err.Error())\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tupdateExperimental(cfg.Experimental)\n\tupdateUsers(cfg.Users)\n\tupdateProxies(cfg.Proxies, cfg.Providers)\n\tupdateRules(cfg.Rules, cfg.SubRules, cfg.RuleProviders)\n\tupdateSniffer(cfg.Sniffer)\n\tupdateHosts(cfg.Hosts)\n\tupdateGeneral(cfg.General, true)\n\tupdateNTP(cfg.NTP)\n\tupdateDNS(cfg.DNS, cfg.General.IPv6)\n\tupdateListeners(cfg.General, cfg.Listeners, force)\n\tupdateTun(cfg.General) // tun should not care \"force\"\n\tupdateIPTables(cfg)\n\tupdateTunnels(cfg.Tunnels)\n\n\ttunnel.OnInnerLoading()\n\n\tinitInnerTcp()\n\tloadProvider(cfg.Providers)\n\tupdateProfile(cfg)\n\tloadProvider(cfg.RuleProviders)\n\truntime.GC()\n\ttunnel.OnRunning()\n\tupdateUpdater(cfg)\n\n\tresolver.ResetConnection()\n}\n\nfunc initInnerTcp() {\n\tinner.New(tunnel.Tunnel)\n}\n\nfunc GetGeneral() *config.General {\n\tports := listener.GetPorts()",

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

So on Android:
1) The Android core (core/src/main/golang) has its own QueryProxyGroup that returns Type, Now, Proxies - no timeout. The delay shown is from proxy's LastDelayForTestUrl (cached).
2) Android doesn't have a "default latency timeout" in app settings - they have unifiedDelay in ConfigurationOverride which is a different thing (unified delay test mode).
3) So Android doesn't "get timeout from config" in the UI for delay test - they might not trigger delay tests from the app at all with a custom timeout. The delay displayed is from the core's cached result (LastDelayForTestUrl). The core itself uses config timeout when it does URL test (in fallback/selector Set, health check, etc.). So the "Android solution" might simply be: **don't have a global default_latency_timeout in app settings**; when the app needs to show delay, it shows the cached value from the core; when the app needs to trigger a delay test (if it does), it would need to get timeout from somewhere. On Android they might not trigger delay test from the app - they might only use healthCheck() which is provider-level. So the key insight: **Android doesn't pass timeout to a delay API from the app** - they don't have a "test delay" button that calls an API with timeout. The desktop (clash-verge-rev) does - it calls delayProxyByName(name, url, timeout). So the desktop **must** pass a timeout when calling the delay API. So we have two options: 1) Core returns timeout in getProxies() so desktop can use it (what I did). 2) Desktop reads timeout from the **profile config file** (the YAML that was loaded) - so when the desktop loads a profile, it could also read the profile's proxy-groups and extract timeout/selected-timeout for each group, then use that when calling the delay API. So we don't need to modify the core - we need the desktop to get the **current profile's config** (proxy-groups) and read timeout/selected-timeout from there. So the desktop app (clash-verge-rev) has access to the profile - when it activates a profile, it has the config. So we need to find where the desktop gets the merged config (with proxy-groups) and use that to build a map of groupName -> { timeout, selectedTimeout }. Then when doing delay test, look up this map. So the flow would be: 1) Revert the core MarshalJSON changes (remove timeout, selectedTimeout from Fallback, Selector, URLTest, LoadBalance). 2) Desktop: get the current profile's proxy-groups config. The desktop might get this from getRuntimeConfig() or from the profile YAML. I will check - clash-verge-rev has getRuntimeConfig or similar that returns the config. So we could read proxy-groups from the runtime config or from the profile file when it's loaded. So we need an API or a way to get proxy-groups (with timeout, selected-timeout) for the current profile. Looking at clash-verge-rev - when they build the proxy list, they use getProxies() which returns the core's proxy tree. The proxy tree doesn't include the raw config (timeout per group). So we need another source: the **profile config**. In clash-verge-rev, the config is managed by the backend - we have get_runtime_config or we might read the profile. I will check - does the desktop have access to the raw config (proxy-groups) somewhere? If yes, we can parse it and get timeout/selected-timeout per group. So the plan: 1) Revert core changes (remove timeout and selectedTimeout from MarshalJSON in fallback, selector, urltest, loadbalance). 2) Desktop: Add a way to get group config (timeout, selectedTimeout). Options: (a) Read from getRuntimeConfig() - the runtime config might have proxy-groups. (b) When loading profile, the backend could expose proxy-groups in an API. (c) Use the same approach as Android: don't pass timeout from UI - use a fixed default (5000). But then we're not "using config timeout". So we need (a) or (b). I will check getRuntimeConfig in clash-verge-rev - what does it return?
</details></think>

So the plan: 1) **Revert the core changes** - remove timeout and selectedTimeout from MarshalJSON in fallback, selector, urltest, loadbalance. 2) **Desktop**: Build a helper that gets group config (timeout, selectedTimeout) from the runtime config. So we need to also fetch getRuntimeConfig() and extract proxy-groups, then merge: for each group name we have in proxyData, look up in runtimeConfig["proxy-groups"] the group with that name and get timeout, selectedTimeout. So we need to pass runtimeConfig or a map of groupName -> { timeout, selectedTimeout } to the components that need it. (b) Or we could add a new API get_proxy_group_config() that returns the group configs from runtime config - but that would still be "reading from config", not from core getProxies. So (a) is the way: use getRuntimeConfig(), extract proxy-groups, build a map groupName -> { timeout, selectedTimeout }. Then when we need timeout for a group, look up in this map. So we need to: 1) Revert core MarshalJSON changes. 2) In desktop, we need to get runtime config. The components that need timeout currently get "group" from state.proxyData.records[groupName] or state.proxyData.groups - and we added timeout/selectedTimeout to IProxyGroupItem from the core. So we need another source: runtime config. So we could: - Use useRuntimeConfig() (or getRuntimeConfig) to get the config. - In the same place where we have proxyData (from getProxies), we also have runtimeConfig. Merge: for each group in proxyData.groups or proxyData.records (for group names), look up in runtimeConfig?.proxy-groups the group config and add timeout, selectedTimeout to the group object. _**Agent (default)**_

已按「和 Android 一样不改 core」的方式改完，总结如下：

---

**1. 为何之前会动 core**

之前是假定桌面端只能从 **core 的 getProxies()** 拿组信息，所以才会在 core 的 MarshalJSON 里加 `timeout` / `selectedTimeout`，让前端直接用。

---

**2. Android 的做法**

- Android 的 ProxyGroup 只有 `type / proxies / now`，**没有** timeout 字段。
- 测速/超时完全由 **已加载的配置** 决定：core 里 fallback/selector 等用的是配置里的 `timeout`、`selected-timeout`，Android 端不传 timeout，也不从 getProxies 读 timeout。
- 也就是说：**timeout 只来自配置（profile），不来自 core 的 API 返回**。

---

**3. 当前实现：不改 core，和 Android 对齐**

- **Core**：已**全部还原**。Fallback 只保留原有的 `selectedTimeout`（本来就有），不再在 MarshalJSON 里增加 `timeout`；Selector / URLTest / LoadBalance 的 MarshalJSON 也恢复为修改前。
- **桌面端**：不再依赖 core 返回 timeout，改为和 Android 一样**从配置取**：
  - 在 **calcuProxies()** 里同时请求 **getRuntimeConfig()**（当前生效的合并配置）。
  - 用 **getGroupTimeoutMapFromConfig()** 从 `config["proxy-groups"]` 里按组名读出每组的 `timeout` 和 `selected-timeout`。
  - 把这些字段**合并进** `groups`、`global` 和 `records` 里返回的组数据，这样现有桌面逻辑（getGroupDelayTimeout、测速、排序等）不用改，只是数据来源从「core 返回」改成了「runtime config 的 proxy-groups」。

效果：

- 节点测速的 timeout 统一来自**配置文件**（runtime config 的 proxy-groups）。
- 选中节点用 `selected-timeout`，其它用 `timeout`，未配置时用默认 5000。
- **不需要再改 core**，和 Android 一样只依赖「配置里已有的 timeout/selected-timeout」。
